```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10}
sum_path_agelas    <- file.path(agelas_dir, paste0("SUMMARY_Agelas_", scenario_filetag, "_volnorm.csv"))
cn_path_agelas     <- file.path(agelas_dir, paste0("RATIO_RANGES_Agelas_", scenario_filetag, ".csv"))
rq_path_agelas     <- file.path(agelas_dir, paste0("RQ_RANGES_Agelas_", scenario_filetag, ".csv"))
model_path_agelas  <- file.path(agelas_dir, paste0("MODEL_RANGES_Agelas_", scenario_filetag, ".csv"))
volqc_path_agelas  <- file.path(agelas_dir, paste0("VOLUME_QC_Agelas_", scenario_filetag, ".csv"))

write_csv(agelas_raw_units,     raw_path_agelas,   na = "")
write_csv(agelas_summary_units, sum_path_agelas,   na = "")
write_csv(cn_ratio_summary,     cn_path_agelas,    na = "")
write_csv(rq_out,               rq_path_agelas,    na = "")
write_csv(model_ranges,         model_path_agelas, na = "")
write_csv(agelas_vol_qc,        volqc_path_agelas, na = "")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11) PRINT KEY RESULTS TO CONSOLE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("Saved Agelas-only files:\n")
cat("  RAW:         ", raw_path_agelas,   "\n")
cat("  SUMMARY:     ", sum_path_agelas,   "\n")
cat("  CN ratios:   ", cn_path_agelas,    "\n")
cat("  RQ ranges:   ", rq_path_agelas,    "\n")
cat("  MODEL ranges:", model_path_agelas, "\n")
cat("  VOL QC:      ", volqc_path_agelas, "\n\n")

cat("Agelas rows with missing volume_ml: ",
    sum(is.na(agelas_raw_num$volume_ml)), "out of", nrow(agelas_raw_num), "\n")

cat("Number of unique_code with >1 distinct finite volume: ",
    nrow(agelas_vol_qc), "\n\n")

# Optional quick prints
cat("CN summaries:\n")
print(cn_ratio_summary)

cat("\nRQ summaries:\n")
print(rq_out)

cat("\nInitial model range table:\n")
print(model_ranges)

# Keep a couple of convenient objects for later code
CN_Bac_new <- cn_ratio_summary %>% filter(parameter == "CN_Bac") %>% pull(mean)
CN_DOM_new <- cn_ratio_summary %>% filter(parameter == "CN_DOM") %>% pull(mean)

CN_Bac_new
CN_DOM_new

```

### All-species tables + Volume-normalized fluxes + model-ready parameter ranges
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10}
################################################################################
# All-species tables rebuilt from individual-level calculations
# INCLUDING volume-normalized fluxes for ALL species
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MAIN PRINCIPLE
#   Recalculate flux for EACH INDIVIDUAL from:
#     Delta = IN - EX
#     Flux_umol_hr = Delta * Q_L_hr
#
#   Then calculate:
#     Flux_umol_hr_ml   = Flux_umol_hr / volume_ml
#     Flux_umol_day_cm3 = Flux_umol_hr * 24 / volume_ml
#
# IMPORTANT
#   - Do not trust pre-existing Flux_umol_hr blindly
#   - Keep original Delta and Flux for QC
#   - Build summary tables only AFTER individual-level recalculation
#   - Include mean + median in all relevant summary tables
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 0) CHECK REQUIRED OBJECTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
stopifnot(exists("raw_individual_tbl_num"))
stopifnot(exists("sponge_db2_with_cn"))
stopifnot(exists("scenario_filetag"))
stopifnot(exists("out_dir"))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) SETTINGS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
digits_conc <- 2
digits_flux <- 2
digits_vol  <- 1

species_keep <- c(
  "Agelas oroides",
  "Chondrosia reniformis",
  "Dysidea avara"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
stats_full <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)

  if (n == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      mean   = NA_real_,
      median = NA_real_,
      ci95   = NA_real_,
      n      = 0L,
      min    = NA_real_,
      max    = NA_real_,
      q05    = NA_real_,
      q95    = NA_real_,
      sd     = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  if (n == 1) {
    return(tibble(
      mean   = x[1],
      median = x[1],
      ci95   = NA_real_,
      n      = 1L,
      min    = x[1],
      max    = x[1],
      q05    = x[1],
      q95    = x[1],
      sd     = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  m  <- mean(x)
  md <- median(x)
  s  <- sd(x)
  se <- s / sqrt(n)
  ci <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se

  tibble(
    mean   = m,
    median = md,
    ci95   = ci,
    n      = as.integer(n),
    min    = min(x),
    max    = max(x),
    q05    = unname(quantile(x, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
    q95    = unname(quantile(x, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)),
    sd     = s
  )
}

first_finite_or_na <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  x[1]
}

vec_stats <- function(x) {
  s <- stats_full(x)
  tibble(
    mean   = s$mean,
    median = s$median,
    ci95   = s$ci95,
    min    = s$min,
    max    = s$max,
    q05    = s$q05,
    q95    = s$q95,
    sd     = s$sd,
    n      = s$n
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) BUILD CLEAN VOLUME TABLE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep volume for ALL selected species
vol_long <- sponge_db2_with_cn %>%
  transmute(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = as.character(species),
    volume_ml   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(estimated_sponge_volume_ml))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    species %in% species_keep,
    !is.na(unique_code),
    unique_code != ""
  )

# QC: unique_code with >1 distinct finite volume within species
vol_qc <- vol_long %>%
  filter(is.finite(volume_ml)) %>%
  distinct(species, unique_code, volume_ml) %>%
  count(species, unique_code, name = "n_distinct_volumes") %>%
  filter(n_distinct_volumes > 1)

# Collapse to one volume per species + unique_code
vol_tbl <- vol_long %>%
  group_by(species, unique_code) %>%
  summarise(
    volume_ml = first_finite_or_na(volume_ml),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) REBUILD RAW TABLE FROM INDIVIDUAL-LEVEL CALCULATIONS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
raw_num_all <- raw_individual_tbl_num %>%
  mutate(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = as.character(species)
  ) %>%
  filter(species %in% species_keep) %>%
  left_join(vol_tbl, by = c("species", "unique_code")) %>%
  mutate(
    # keep originals for QC
    Delta_original        = Delta,
    Flux_umol_hr_original = Flux_umol_hr,

    # recalculate from raw individual values
    Delta = ifelse(
      is.finite(IN) & is.finite(EX),
      IN - EX,
      NA_real_
    ),

    Flux_umol_hr = ifelse(
      is.finite(Delta) & is.finite(Q_L_hr),
      Delta * Q_L_hr,
      NA_real_
    ),

    Flux_umol_hr_ml = ifelse(
      is.finite(Flux_umol_hr) & is.finite(volume_ml) & volume_ml > 0,
      Flux_umol_hr / volume_ml,
      NA_real_
    ),

    Flux_umol_day_cm3 = ifelse(
      is.finite(Flux_umol_hr) & is.finite(volume_ml) & volume_ml > 0,
      Flux_umol_hr * 24 / volume_ml,
      NA_real_
    ),

    # QC columns
    Delta_diff_from_original = Delta - Delta_original,
    Flux_diff_from_original  = Flux_umol_hr - Flux_umol_hr_original
  ) %>%
  arrange(species, parameter, unique_code)

# Pretty export version
raw_all <- raw_num_all %>%
  mutate(
    IN                      = round(IN, digits_conc),
    EX                      = round(EX, digits_conc),
    Delta                   = round(Delta, digits_conc),
    Delta_original          = round(Delta_original, digits_conc),
    Q_L_hr                  = round(Q_L_hr, digits_flux),
    Flux_umol_hr            = round(Flux_umol_hr, digits_flux),
    Flux_umol_hr_original   = round(Flux_umol_hr_original, digits_flux),
    volume_ml               = round(volume_ml, digits_vol),
    Flux_umol_hr_ml         = round(Flux_umol_hr_ml, digits_flux),
    Flux_umol_day_cm3       = round(Flux_umol_day_cm3, digits_flux),
    Delta_diff_from_original = round(Delta_diff_from_original, digits_flux),
    Flux_diff_from_original  = round(Flux_diff_from_original, digits_flux)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) SUMMARY TABLE WITH MEAN + MEDIAN
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
summary_num_all <- raw_num_all %>%
  mutate(pair_ok = is.finite(IN) & is.finite(EX)) %>%
  group_by(species, parameter) %>%
  summarise(
    # IN
    IN_mean    = stats_full(IN)$mean,
    IN_median  = stats_full(IN)$median,
    IN_ci95    = stats_full(IN)$ci95,
    IN_min     = stats_full(IN)$min,
    IN_max     = stats_full(IN)$max,
    IN_q05     = stats_full(IN)$q05,
    IN_q95     = stats_full(IN)$q95,

    # EX
    EX_mean    = stats_full(EX)$mean,
    EX_median  = stats_full(EX)$median,
    EX_ci95    = stats_full(EX)$ci95,
    EX_min     = stats_full(EX)$min,
    EX_max     = stats_full(EX)$max,
    EX_q05     = stats_full(EX)$q05,
    EX_q95     = stats_full(EX)$q95,

    # Delta
    Delta_mean   = stats_full(Delta)$mean,
    Delta_median = stats_full(Delta)$median,
    Delta_ci95   = stats_full(Delta)$ci95,
    Delta_min    = stats_full(Delta)$min,
    Delta_max    = stats_full(Delta)$max,
    Delta_q05    = stats_full(Delta)$q05,
    Delta_q95    = stats_full(Delta)$q95,

    # Flow
    Q_mean     = stats_full(Q_L_hr)$mean,
    Q_median   = stats_full(Q_L_hr)$median,
    Q_ci95     = stats_full(Q_L_hr)$ci95,
    Q_min      = stats_full(Q_L_hr)$min,
    Q_max      = stats_full(Q_L_hr)$max,

    # Flux
    Flux_mean   = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr)$mean,
    Flux_median = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr)$median,
    Flux_ci95   = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr)$ci95,
    Flux_min    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr)$min,
    Flux_max    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr)$max,
    Flux_q05    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr)$q05,
    Flux_q95    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr)$q95,

    # Volume
    Vol_mean    = stats_full(volume_ml)$mean,
    Vol_median  = stats_full(volume_ml)$median,
    Vol_ci95    = stats_full(volume_ml)$ci95,
    Vol_min     = stats_full(volume_ml)$min,
    Vol_max     = stats_full(volume_ml)$max,

    # FluxVol hr
    FluxVol_hr_mean   = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr_ml)$mean,
    FluxVol_hr_median = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr_ml)$median,
    FluxVol_hr_ci95   = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr_ml)$ci95,
    FluxVol_hr_min    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr_ml)$min,
    FluxVol_hr_max    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr_ml)$max,
    FluxVol_hr_q05    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr_ml)$q05,
    FluxVol_hr_q95    = stats_full(Flux_umol_hr_ml)$q95,

    # FluxVol day
    FluxVol_day_mean   = stats_full(Flux_umol_day_cm3)$mean,
    FluxVol_day_median = stats_full(Flux_umol_day_cm3)$median,
    FluxVol_day_ci95   = stats_full(Flux_umol_day_cm3)$ci95,
    FluxVol_day_min    = stats_full(Flux_umol_day_cm3)$min,
    FluxVol_day_max    = stats_full(Flux_umol_day_cm3)$max,
    FluxVol_day_q05    = stats_full(Flux_umol_day_cm3)$q05,
    FluxVol_day_q95    = stats_full(Flux_umol_day_cm3)$q95,

    # Counts
    n       = stats_full(Delta)$n,
    n_pairs = sum(pair_ok),

    pct_I = ifelse(
      sum(pair_ok) == 0,
      NA_real_,
      100 * sum(pair_ok & Delta > 0, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(pair_ok)
    ),

    pct_E = ifelse(
      sum(pair_ok) == 0,
      NA_real_,
      100 * sum(pair_ok & Delta < 0, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(pair_ok)
    ),

    # Paired test
    p_value = {
      d <- Delta[pair_ok]
      if (length(d) < 2 || length(unique(d[is.finite(d)])) < 2) {
        NA_real_
      } else {
        sh_p <- tryCatch(shapiro.test(d)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_)
        if (!is.na(sh_p) && sh_p > 0.05) {
          tryCatch(
            t.test(IN[pair_ok], EX[pair_ok], paired = TRUE)$p.value,
            error = function(e) NA_real_
          )
        } else {
          tryCatch(
            wilcox.test(IN[pair_ok], EX[pair_ok], paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE)$p.value,
            error = function(e) NA_real_
          )
        }
      }
    },

    test_used = {
      d <- Delta[pair_ok]
      if (length(d) < 2 || length(unique(d[is.finite(d)])) < 2) {
        NA_character_
      } else {
        sh_p <- tryCatch(shapiro.test(d)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_)
        if (!is.na(sh_p) && sh_p > 0.05) "paired_t" else "wilcoxon_paired"
      }
    },

    sig_star = ifelse(!is.na(p_value) & p_value < 0.05, "*", ""),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(IN_mean, IN_median, IN_ci95, IN_min, IN_max, IN_q05, IN_q95,
        EX_mean, EX_median, EX_ci95, EX_min, EX_max, EX_q05, EX_q95,
        Delta_mean, Delta_median, Delta_ci95, Delta_min, Delta_max, Delta_q05, Delta_q95),
      ~ round(.x, digits_conc)
    ),
    across(
      c(Q_mean, Q_median, Q_ci95, Q_min, Q_max,
        Flux_mean, Flux_median, Flux_ci95, Flux_min, Flux_max, Flux_q05, Flux_q95,
        FluxVol_hr_mean, FluxVol_hr_median, FluxVol_hr_ci95, FluxVol_hr_min, FluxVol_hr_max, FluxVol_hr_q05, FluxVol_hr_q95,
        FluxVol_day_mean, FluxVol_day_median, FluxVol_day_ci95, FluxVol_day_min, FluxVol_day_max, FluxVol_day_q05, FluxVol_day_q95),
      ~ round(.x, digits_flux)
    ),
    across(c(Vol_mean, Vol_median, Vol_ci95, Vol_min, Vol_max), ~ round(.x, digits_vol)),
    pct_I = round(pct_I, 1),
    pct_E = round(pct_E, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(species, parameter)


# ==============================================================================
# 5b) CLEAN SUMMARY TABLE FOR LIM INPUT
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Create a tidy, machine-readable summary table for the input-builder script.
# Unlike summary_units_all, this file is not meant for visual presentation.
# It keeps one row per species × parameter and plain column names.
# ==============================================================================

summary_clean <- summary_num_all %>%
  transmute(
    species,
    parameter,
    mean   = Delta_mean,
    median = Delta_median,
    ci95   = Delta_ci95,
    min    = Delta_min,
    max    = Delta_max,
    q05    = Delta_q05,
    q95    = Delta_q95,
    n,
    n_pairs,
    pct_I,
    pct_E,
    p_value,
    test_used,
    sig_star
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CI_low  = median - ci95,
    CI_high = median + ci95
  ) %>%
  arrange(species, parameter)

summary_clean_path <- file.path(
  allsp_dir,
  paste0("SUMMARY_CLEAN_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv")
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SAVE CLEAN FILE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
write_csv(summary_clean, summary_clean_path, na = "")

cat("  SUMMARY CLEAN:", summary_clean_path, "\n")


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) UNIT-LABELED EXPORT TABLES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
raw_units_all <- raw_all %>%
  rename(
    `IN (µmol L^-1)`                    = IN,
    `EX (µmol L^-1)`                    = EX,
    `Delta_recalc (µmol L^-1)`          = Delta,
    `Delta_original (µmol L^-1)`        = Delta_original,
    `Q (L hr^-1)`                       = Q_L_hr,
    `Flux_recalc (µmol hr^-1)`          = Flux_umol_hr,
    `Flux_original (µmol hr^-1)`        = Flux_umol_hr_original,
    `Volume (cm^3)`                     = volume_ml,
    `FluxVol_hr (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)`     = Flux_umol_hr_ml,
    `FluxVol_day (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`   = Flux_umol_day_cm3,
    `Delta_diff_from_original`          = Delta_diff_from_original,
    `Flux_diff_from_original`           = Flux_diff_from_original
  )

summary_units_all <- summary_num_all %>%
  rename(
    `IN_mean (µmol L^-1)`                 = IN_mean,
    `IN_median (µmol L^-1)`               = IN_median,
    `IN_ci95 (µmol L^-1)`                 = IN_ci95,
    `IN_min (µmol L^-1)`                  = IN_min,
    `IN_max (µmol L^-1)`                  = IN_max,
    `IN_q05 (µmol L^-1)`                  = IN_q05,
    `IN_q95 (µmol L^-1)`                  = IN_q95,

    `EX_mean (µmol L^-1)`                 = EX_mean,
    `EX_median (µmol L^-1)`               = EX_median,
    `EX_ci95 (µmol L^-1)`                 = EX_ci95,
    `EX_min (µmol L^-1)`                  = EX_min,
    `EX_max (µmol L^-1)`                  = EX_max,
    `EX_q05 (µmol L^-1)`                  = EX_q05,
    `EX_q95 (µmol L^-1)`                  = EX_q95,

    `Delta_mean (µmol L^-1)`              = Delta_mean,
    `Delta_median (µmol L^-1)`            = Delta_median,
    `Delta_ci95 (µmol L^-1)`              = Delta_ci95,
    `Delta_min (µmol L^-1)`               = Delta_min,
    `Delta_max (µmol L^-1)`               = Delta_max,
    `Delta_q05 (µmol L^-1)`               = Delta_q05,
    `Delta_q95 (µmol L^-1)`               = Delta_q95,

    `Q_mean (L hr^-1)`                    = Q_mean,
    `Q_median (L hr^-1)`                  = Q_median,
    `Q_ci95 (L hr^-1)`                    = Q_ci95,
    `Q_min (L hr^-1)`                     = Q_min,
    `Q_max (L hr^-1)`                     = Q_max,

    `Flux_mean (µmol hr^-1)`              = Flux_mean,
    `Flux_median (µmol hr^-1)`            = Flux_median,
    `Flux_ci95 (µmol hr^-1)`              = Flux_ci95,
    `Flux_min (µmol hr^-1)`               = Flux_min,
    `Flux_max (µmol hr^-1)`               = Flux_max,
    `Flux_q05 (µmol hr^-1)`               = Flux_q05,
    `Flux_q95 (µmol hr^-1)`               = Flux_q95,

    `Volume_mean (cm^3)`                  = Vol_mean,
    `Volume_median (cm^3)`                = Vol_median,
    `Volume_ci95 (cm^3)`                  = Vol_ci95,
    `Volume_min (cm^3)`                   = Vol_min,
    `Volume_max (cm^3)`                   = Vol_max,

    `FluxVol_hr_mean (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)`   = FluxVol_hr_mean,
    `FluxVol_hr_median (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)` = FluxVol_hr_median,
    `FluxVol_hr_ci95 (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)`   = FluxVol_hr_ci95,
    `FluxVol_hr_min (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_hr_min,
    `FluxVol_hr_max (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_hr_max,
    `FluxVol_hr_q05 (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_hr_q05,
    `FluxVol_hr_q95 (µmol hr^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_hr_q95,

    `FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`   = FluxVol_day_mean,
    `FluxVol_day_median (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` = FluxVol_day_median,
    `FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`   = FluxVol_day_ci95,
    `FluxVol_day_min (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_day_min,
    `FluxVol_day_max (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_day_max,
    `FluxVol_day_q05 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_day_q05,
    `FluxVol_day_q95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`    = FluxVol_day_q95
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) CN_Bac AND CN_DOM FROM RAW-LEVEL RATIOS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
cn_input_collapsed <- raw_num_all %>%
  filter(parameter %in% c("Bact_C", "Bact_N", "DOC", "DON")) %>%
  group_by(species, unique_code, parameter) %>%
  summarise(
    IN_value = {
      x <- IN[is.finite(IN)]
      if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else mean(x)
    },
    n_rows = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cn_input_qc <- cn_input_collapsed %>%
  filter(n_rows > 1)

cn_ratio_raw <- cn_input_collapsed %>%
  select(species, unique_code, parameter, IN_value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = parameter, values_from = IN_value) %>%
  mutate(
    CN_Bac = ifelse(
      is.finite(Bact_C) & is.finite(Bact_N) & Bact_N != 0,
      Bact_C / Bact_N,
      NA_real_
    ),
    CN_DOM = ifelse(
      is.finite(DOC) & is.finite(DON) & DON != 0,
      DOC / DON,
      NA_real_
    )
  )

cn_ratio_summary <- bind_rows(
  cn_ratio_raw %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(vec_stats(CN_Bac), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(parameter = "CN_Bac", .before = 2),

  cn_ratio_raw %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(vec_stats(CN_DOM), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(parameter = "CN_DOM", .before = 2)
) %>%
  mutate(across(c(mean, median, ci95, min, max, q05, q95, sd), ~ round(.x, 3))) %>%
  arrange(species, parameter)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) RQ FROM RAW-LEVEL VOLUME-NORMALIZED FLUXES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
rq_input_collapsed <- raw_num_all %>%
  filter(parameter %in% c("O2", "DIC_pH", "DIC_dicex")) %>%
  group_by(species, unique_code, parameter) %>%
  summarise(
    Flux_day_value = {
      x <- Flux_umol_day_cm3[is.finite(Flux_umol_day_cm3)]
      if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else mean(x)
    },
    n_rows = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

rq_input_qc <- rq_input_collapsed %>%
  filter(n_rows > 1)

rq_raw <- rq_input_collapsed %>%
  select(species, unique_code, parameter, Flux_day_value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = parameter, values_from = Flux_day_value) %>%
  mutate(
    CO2prod_pH    = ifelse(is.finite(DIC_pH), abs(DIC_pH), NA_real_),
    CO2prod_dicex = ifelse(is.finite(DIC_dicex), abs(DIC_dicex), NA_real_),

    RQ_classic_pH = ifelse(
      is.finite(O2) & is.finite(CO2prod_pH) & O2 > 0 & CO2prod_pH > 0,
      CO2prod_pH / O2,
      NA_real_
    ),
    RQ_model_pH = ifelse(
      is.finite(O2) & is.finite(CO2prod_pH) & O2 > 0 & CO2prod_pH > 0,
      O2 / CO2prod_pH,
      NA_real_
    ),

    RQ_classic_dicex = ifelse(
      is.finite(O2) & is.finite(CO2prod_dicex) & O2 > 0 & CO2prod_dicex > 0,
      CO2prod_dicex / O2,
      NA_real_
    ),
    RQ_model_dicex = ifelse(
      is.finite(O2) & is.finite(CO2prod_dicex) & O2 > 0 & CO2prod_dicex > 0,
      O2 / CO2prod_dicex,
      NA_real_
    )
  )

rq_summary <- bind_rows(
  rq_raw %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(vec_stats(RQ_classic_pH), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(parameter = "RQ_classic_pH", .before = 2),

  rq_raw %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(vec_stats(RQ_model_pH), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(parameter = "RQ_model_pH", .before = 2),

  rq_raw %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(vec_stats(RQ_classic_dicex), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(parameter = "RQ_classic_dicex", .before = 2),

  rq_raw %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(vec_stats(RQ_model_dicex), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(parameter = "RQ_model_dicex", .before = 2)
) %>%
  mutate(across(c(mean, median, ci95, min, max, q05, q95, sd), ~ round(.x, 3))) %>%
  arrange(species, parameter)

rq_out <- rq_summary

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9) MODEL RANGE TABLE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ratio_ranges <- bind_rows(
  cn_ratio_summary %>%
    filter(parameter %in% c("CN_Bac", "CN_DOM")) %>%
    transmute(species, parameter, min, max),

  rq_summary %>%
    filter(parameter %in% c("RQ_model_pH", "RQ_model_dicex")) %>%
    transmute(species, parameter, min, max)
)

flux_ranges <- summary_num_all %>%
  filter(parameter %in% c("O2", "DOC", "Bact_C", "NH4", "NO2", "NO3")) %>%
  transmute(
    species,
    parameter,
    min = FluxVol_day_min,
    max = FluxVol_day_max
  )

model_ranges <- bind_rows(ratio_ranges, flux_ranges) %>%
  mutate(
    parameter = factor(
      parameter,
      levels = c(
        "CN_Bac",
        "CN_DOM",
        "RQ_model_pH",
        "RQ_model_dicex",
        "O2",
        "DOC",
        "Bact_C",
        "NH4",
        "NO2",
        "NO3"
      )
    ),
    min = round(min, 3),
    max = round(max, 3)
  ) %>%
  arrange(species, parameter) %>%
  mutate(parameter = as.character(parameter))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10) SAVE OUTPUTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
allsp_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "All_3_species_recalc_flux_with_all_volumes")
dir.create(allsp_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

raw_path_all    <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("RAW_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))
sum_path_all    <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("SUMMARY_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))
cn_path_all     <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("RATIO_RANGES_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))
rq_path_all     <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("RQ_RANGES_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))
model_path_all  <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("MODEL_RANGES_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))
volqc_path_all  <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("VOLUME_QC_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))
cnqc_path_all   <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("CN_INPUT_QC_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))
rqqc_path_all   <- file.path(allsp_dir, paste0("RQ_INPUT_QC_ALLSPECIES_", scenario_filetag, "_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"))

write_csv(raw_units_all,     raw_path_all,   na = "")
write_csv(summary_units_all, sum_path_all,   na = "")
write_csv(cn_ratio_summary,  cn_path_all,    na = "")
write_csv(rq_out,            rq_path_all,    na = "")
write_csv(model_ranges,      model_path_all, na = "")
write_csv(vol_qc,            volqc_path_all, na = "")
write_csv(cn_input_qc,       cnqc_path_all,  na = "")
write_csv(rq_input_qc,       rqqc_path_all,  na = "")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11) PRINT KEY RESULTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("Saved recalculated all-species files:\n")
cat("  RAW:          ", raw_path_all,   "\n")
cat("  SUMMARY:      ", sum_path_all,   "\n")
cat("  CN ratios:    ", cn_path_all,    "\n")
cat("  RQ ranges:    ", rq_path_all,    "\n")
cat("  MODEL ranges: ", model_path_all, "\n")
cat("  VOL QC:       ", volqc_path_all, "\n")
cat("  CN QC:        ", cnqc_path_all,  "\n")
cat("  RQ QC:        ", rqqc_path_all,  "\n\n")

cat("Rows with missing volume_ml: ",
    sum(is.na(raw_num_all$volume_ml)), "out of", nrow(raw_num_all), "\n")

cat("Rows with recalculated flux available: ",
    sum(is.finite(raw_num_all$Flux_umol_hr)), "out of", nrow(raw_num_all), "\n")

cat("Rows with FluxVol_day available: ",
    sum(is.finite(raw_num_all$Flux_umol_day_cm3)), "out of", nrow(raw_num_all), "\n\n")

cat("Volume availability by species:\n")
print(
  raw_num_all %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(
      n_rows = n(),
      n_with_volume = sum(is.finite(volume_ml)),
      n_with_flux = sum(is.finite(Flux_umol_hr)),
      n_with_fluxvol_day = sum(is.finite(Flux_umol_day_cm3)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
)

cat("\nCN summaries:\n")
print(cn_ratio_summary)

cat("\nRQ summaries:\n")
print(rq_out)

cat("\nModel ranges:\n")
print(model_ranges)

```
### Build LIM model parameters automatically and write updated input file
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10}
# ==============================================================================
# Rebuild LIM input file from original template + updated parameter values
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Build a clean new input file by:
#   1) reading the original template input file
#   2) extracting all original parameter values
#   3) replacing only the parameters we want to update
#   4) adding new sampling parameters (*_min / *_max / helpers)
#   5) rebuilding a clean ## Parameters block from scratch
#   6) keeping all remaining model sections unchanged
# ==============================================================================

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)

# ==============================================================================
# 1) USER SETTINGS
# ==============================================================================
settings <- list(
  species_full   = "Chondrosia reniformis",
  species_table3 = "C. reniformis",
  range_method   = "median_ci",      # "median_ci" / "mean_ci" / "min_max"
  cn_spo_method  = "sizeclass_mean", # "small" / "big" / "sizeclass_mean"
  rq_parameter   = "RQ_model_pH",
  out_digits     = 3
)

# ==============================================================================
# 2) FILE PATHS
# ==============================================================================
base_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species/All_3_species_recalc_flux_with_all_volumes"

summary_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  "SUMMARY_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"
)

ratio_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  "RATIO_RANGES_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"
)

rq_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  "RQ_RANGES_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"
)

template_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Geodia barretti/4139792"

input_template <- file.path(
  template_dir,
  "MN_Gbarretti_smaller_fit.input"
)

output_input <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  paste0(
    str_replace_all(settings$species_full, " ", "_"),
    "_",
    settings$range_method,
    "_rebuilt.input"
  )
)

output_param_table <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  paste0(
    str_replace_all(settings$species_full, " ", "_"),
    "_",
    settings$range_method,
    "_parameter_table.csv"
  )
)

# ==============================================================================
# 3) TABLE 3 INSIDE SCRIPT
# ==============================================================================
table3 <- data.frame(
  Section = c(rep("a", 15), rep("b", 15)),
  Species = c(
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara"
  ),
  Metric = c(
    rep("C per area", 5),
    rep("C per volume", 5),
    rep("%C/DW", 5),
    rep("N per area", 5),
    rep("N per volume", 5),
    rep("%N/DW", 5)
  ),
  Unit = c(
    rep("mg C/cm²", 5),
    rep("mg C/cm³", 5),
    rep("%", 5),
    rep("mg N/cm²", 5),
    rep("mg N/cm³", 5),
    rep("%", 5)
  ),
  Small = c(
    "72.54 ± 14.12", "145.99 ± 117.54", "47.89 ± 23.57", "5.48 ± 2.21", "8.57 ± 4.72",
    "65.42 ± 9.53", "42.08 ± 24.71", "59.61 ± 28.77", "21.92 ± 8.84", "8.24 ± 4.54",
    "34.20 ± 2.34 %", "29.13 ± 2.55 %", "13.52 ± 0.95 %", "27.47 ± 2.54 %", "19.15 ± 2.86 %",
    "22.14 ± 4.23", "44.61 ± 34.63", "11.35 ± 6.11", "1.09 ± 0.46", "1.22 ± 0.62",
    "19.99 ± 3.09", "12.92 ± 7.11", "14.09 ± 7.54", "4.37 ± 1.85", "1.17 ± 0.60",
    "10.47 ± 0.73 %", "9.15 ± 0.75 %", "3.07 ± 0.13%", "5.39 ± 0.82%", "2.74 ± 0.57%"
  ),
  Big = c(
    "61.22 ± 6.04", "78.30 ± 41.50", "79.75 ± 11.94", "3.43 ± 2.06", "11.87 ± 3.46",
    "42.49 ± 10.80", "16.20 ± 4.98", "36.42 ± 17.32", "13.71 ± 8.22", "11.41 ± 3.32",
    NA, "30.31 ± 2.19%", NA, NA, NA,
    "18.79 ± 1.90", "24.08 ± 12.82", "19.40 ± 2.90", "0.68 ± 0.48", "1.62 ± 0.44",
    "13.03 ± 3.25", "4.97 ± 1.57", "8.90 ± 4.35", "2.72 ± 1.91", "1.56 ± 0.42",
    NA, NA, "3.35 ± 0.26%", NA, "2.61 ± 0.47%"
  ),
  p_Size = c(
    "***","**","** a","***","***",
    "***","***","***","** a","***",
    "n.s","*","n.s","n.s","n.s",
    "***","***","* a","* a","***",
    "***","***","***","** a","***",
    "n.s","n.s","***","n.s","***"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ==============================================================================
# 4) HELPERS
# ==============================================================================
safe_num <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))

fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), x)
}

parse_mean_sd <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || x == "") return(c(mean = NA_real_, sd = NA_real_))
  x2 <- x %>% str_replace_all("%", "") %>% str_squish()
  parts <- str_split(x2, "±", simplify = TRUE)
  if (ncol(parts) < 2) return(c(mean = NA_real_, sd = NA_real_))
  c(
    mean = safe_num(str_trim(parts[1])),
    sd   = safe_num(str_trim(parts[2]))
  )
}

find_col <- function(df, patterns, required = TRUE) {
  nms <- names(df)
  idx <- rep(FALSE, length(nms))
  for (p in patterns) {
    idx <- idx | str_detect(nms, regex(p, ignore_case = TRUE))
  }
  hits <- nms[idx]
  if (length(hits) == 0 && required) {
    stop("Could not find column matching: ", paste(patterns, collapse = " | "))
  }
  if (length(hits) > 1) {
    message("Multiple matches found: ", paste(hits, collapse = ", "), ". Using first: ", hits[1])
  }
  if (length(hits) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  hits[1]
}

get_center_and_range <- function(row, method,
                                 median_col = NULL,
                                 mean_col   = NULL,
                                 ci_col     = NULL,
                                 min_col    = NULL,
                                 max_col    = NULL) {
  if (nrow(row) != 1) stop("Expected exactly one row, got ", nrow(row))

  if (method == "median_ci") {
    center <- safe_num(row[[median_col]][1])
    ci     <- safe_num(row[[ci_col]][1])
    return(list(center = center, min = center - ci, max = center + ci))
  }

  if (method == "mean_ci") {
    center <- safe_num(row[[mean_col]][1])
    ci     <- safe_num(row[[ci_col]][1])
    return(list(center = center, min = center - ci, max = center + ci))
  }

  if (method == "min_max") {
    lo <- safe_num(row[[min_col]][1])
    hi <- safe_num(row[[max_col]][1])
    return(list(center = (lo + hi) / 2, min = lo, max = hi))
  }

  stop("Unknown method: ", method)
}

sum_ranges <- function(lst) {
  tibble(
    center = sum(map_dbl(lst, "center"), na.rm = TRUE),
    min    = sum(map_dbl(lst, "min"), na.rm = TRUE),
    max    = sum(map_dbl(lst, "max"), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Parse existing parameter lines from template
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
extract_param_lines <- function(lines) {
  start_idx <- grep("^## Parameters\\s*$", lines)
  end_idx   <- grep("^## End parameters\\s*$", lines)

  if (length(start_idx) != 1 || length(end_idx) != 1 || end_idx <= start_idx) {
    stop("Could not detect a valid ## Parameters block in template.")
  }

  param_block <- lines[(start_idx + 1):(end_idx - 1)]

  param_lines <- param_block[str_detect(param_block, "=")]

  tibble(raw = param_lines) %>%
    mutate(
      comment = ifelse(str_detect(raw, "!"),
                       str_trim(str_replace(raw, "^[^!]*!", "")),
                       NA_character_),
      before_comment = str_trim(str_replace(raw, "!.*$", "")),
      param = str_trim(str_extract(before_comment, "^[^=]+")),
      value = str_trim(str_replace(before_comment, "^[^=]+=", "")),
      value_num = safe_num(str_replace_all(value, "\\s+", ""))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(param), param != "")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Build one formatted parameter line
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_param_line <- function(param, value, comment = NULL, digits = 3) {
  paste0(
    param,
    "\t\t=\t\t",
    fmt_num(value, digits),
    if (!is.null(comment) && !is.na(comment) && nzchar(comment)) paste0("\t\t!", comment) else ""
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# 5) CLEAN TABLE 3
# ==============================================================================
table3_clean <- table3 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Small_mean = parse_mean_sd(Small)[["mean"]],
    Small_sd   = parse_mean_sd(Small)[["sd"]],
    Big_mean   = parse_mean_sd(Big)[["mean"]],
    Big_sd     = parse_mean_sd(Big)[["sd"]]
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ==============================================================================
# 6) CN_Spo FROM TABLE 3
# ==============================================================================
get_cn_spo_from_table3 <- function(table3_df, species_name, method = c("small", "big", "sizeclass_mean")) {
  method <- match.arg(method)

  c_row <- table3_df %>% filter(Species == species_name, Metric == "C per volume")
  n_row <- table3_df %>% filter(Species == species_name, Metric == "N per volume")

  if (nrow(c_row) != 1) stop("Could not find unique C per volume row for ", species_name)
  if (nrow(n_row) != 1) stop("Could not find unique N per volume row for ", species_name)

  cn_small <- c_row$Small_mean / n_row$Small_mean
  cn_big   <- c_row$Big_mean   / n_row$Big_mean

  value <- switch(
    method,
    small = cn_small,
    big = cn_big,
    sizeclass_mean = mean(c(cn_small, cn_big), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  list(
    CN_Spo = value,
    NC_Spo = 1 / value
  )
}

cn_spo_info <- get_cn_spo_from_table3(
  table3_df = table3_clean,
  species_name = settings$species_table3,
  method = settings$cn_spo_method
)

# ==============================================================================
# 7) READ SOURCE FILES
# ==============================================================================
summary_df <- read_csv(summary_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
ratio_df   <- read_csv(ratio_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
rq_df      <- read_csv(rq_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

summary_sp <- summary_df %>% filter(species == settings$species_full)
ratio_sp   <- ratio_df %>% filter(species == settings$species_full)
rq_sp      <- rq_df %>% filter(species == settings$species_full)

if (nrow(summary_sp) == 0) stop("No rows found in summary file for species: ", settings$species_full)
if (nrow(ratio_sp)   == 0) stop("No rows found in ratio file for species: ", settings$species_full)
if (nrow(rq_sp)      == 0) stop("No rows found in rq file for species: ", settings$species_full)

# ==============================================================================
# 8) DETECT COLUMNS
# ==============================================================================
summary_median_col <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^FluxVol_day_median", "FluxVol_day.*median"))
summary_mean_col   <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^FluxVol_day_mean", "FluxVol_day.*mean"))
summary_ci_col     <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^FluxVol_day_ci95", "FluxVol_day.*ci95"))
summary_min_col    <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^FluxVol_day_min", "FluxVol_day.*min"))
summary_max_col    <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^FluxVol_day_max", "FluxVol_day.*max"))

ratio_median_col <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^median$"))
ratio_mean_col   <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^mean$"))
ratio_ci_col     <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^ci95$"))
ratio_min_col    <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^min$"))
ratio_max_col    <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^max$"))

rq_median_col <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^median$"))
rq_mean_col   <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^mean$"))
rq_ci_col     <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^ci95$"))
rq_min_col    <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^min$"))
rq_max_col    <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^max$"))

# ==============================================================================
# 9) EXTRACTOR FUNCTIONS
# ==============================================================================
get_summary_param_exact <- function(param_name) {
  row <- summary_sp %>% filter(parameter == param_name)
  if (nrow(row) != 1) stop("Expected exactly one summary row for parameter: ", param_name, ". Found: ", nrow(row))
  res <- get_center_and_range(
    row = row,
    method = settings$range_method,
    median_col = summary_median_col,
    mean_col   = summary_mean_col,
    ci_col     = summary_ci_col,
    min_col    = summary_min_col,
    max_col    = summary_max_col
  )
  tibble(parameter = param_name, center = res$center, min = res$min, max = res$max)
}

get_ratio_param <- function(param_name) {
  row <- ratio_sp %>% filter(parameter == param_name)
  if (nrow(row) != 1) stop("Expected exactly one ratio row for parameter: ", param_name, ". Found: ", nrow(row))
  res <- get_center_and_range(
    row = row,
    method = settings$range_method,
    median_col = ratio_median_col,
    mean_col   = ratio_mean_col,
    ci_col     = ratio_ci_col,
    min_col    = ratio_min_col,
    max_col    = ratio_max_col
  )
  tibble(parameter = param_name, center = res$center, min = res$min, max = res$max)
}

get_rq_param <- function(param_name) {
  row <- rq_sp %>% filter(parameter == param_name)
  if (nrow(row) != 1) stop("Expected exactly one rq row for parameter: ", param_name, ". Found: ", nrow(row))
  res <- get_center_and_range(
    row = row,
    method = settings$range_method,
    median_col = rq_median_col,
    mean_col   = rq_mean_col,
    ci_col     = rq_ci_col,
    min_col    = rq_min_col,
    max_col    = rq_max_col
  )
  tibble(parameter = param_name, center = res$center, min = res$min, max = res$max)
}

# ==============================================================================
# 10) BUILD UPDATED / NEW VALUES
# ==============================================================================
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10) BUILD BACTERIA UPTAKE SUMS ROBUSTLY
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
#   Build BacCupt and BacNupt from whichever bacteria-related components
#   are actually available in summary_sp.
#
# IMPORTANT
#   - If Pro_C / Pro_N exist, they will be used
#   - If they do not exist, they will be skipped
#   - The code will not crash if one component is missing
#   - Uses FluxVol_day columns from your current summary_sp table
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

stopifnot(exists("summary_sp"))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10a) Check which parameters actually exist
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
available_params <- summary_sp %>%
  distinct(parameter) %>%
  pull(parameter)

bacC_requested <- c("Bact_C", "Syn_C", "Pro_C", "PEuk_C", "NEuk_C")
bacN_requested <- c("Bact_N", "Syn_N", "Pro_N", "PEuk_N", "NEuk_N")

bacC_used <- intersect(bacC_requested, available_params)
bacN_used <- intersect(bacN_requested, available_params)

bacC_missing <- setdiff(bacC_requested, bacC_used)
bacN_missing <- setdiff(bacN_requested, bacN_used)

if (length(bacC_missing) > 0) {
  message("Missing bacteria C components skipped: ",
          paste(bacC_missing, collapse = ", "))
}

if (length(bacN_missing) > 0) {
  message("Missing bacteria N components skipped: ",
          paste(bacN_missing, collapse = ", "))
}

if (length(bacC_used) == 0) {
  stop("No bacteria C components were found in summary_sp.")
}

if (length(bacN_used) == 0) {
  stop("No bacteria N components were found in summary_sp.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10b) Helper: safely pull one parameter from summary_sp
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
get_summary_param_exact <- function(param_name) {
  out <- summary_sp %>%
    filter(parameter == param_name)

  if (nrow(out) == 0) {
    stop("Parameter not found in summary_sp: ", param_name)
  }

  out
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10c) Helper: sum mean / min / max across components
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
sum_ranges <- function(x) {
  tibble(
    mean = sum(vapply(x, function(z) z$mean, numeric(1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    min  = sum(vapply(x, function(z) z$min,  numeric(1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    max  = sum(vapply(x, function(z) z$max,  numeric(1)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10d) Build BacCupt
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
bacC_list <- lapply(bacC_used, function(param_name) {
  tmp <- get_summary_param_exact(param_name)

  list(
    mean = tmp$`FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`[1],
    min  = tmp$`FluxVol_day_min (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`[1],
    max  = tmp$`FluxVol_day_max (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`[1]
  )
})

bac_sum <- sum_ranges(bacC_list) %>%
  rename(center = mean) %>%
  mutate(parameter = "BacCupt", .before = 1)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10e) Build BacNupt
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
bacN_list <- lapply(bacN_used, function(param_name) {
  tmp <- get_summary_param_exact(param_name)

  list(
    mean = tmp$`FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`[1],
    min  = tmp$`FluxVol_day_min (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`[1],
    max  = tmp$`FluxVol_day_max (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`[1]
  )
})

bacN_sum <- sum_ranges(bacN_list) %>%
  rename(center = mean) %>%
  mutate(parameter = "BacNupt", .before = 1)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10f) Optional QC prints
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("\nBacteria C components used:\n")
print(bacC_used)

cat("\nBacteria N components used:\n")
print(bacN_used)

cat("\nBacCupt summary:\n")
print(bac_sum)

cat("\nBacNupt summary:\n")
print(bacN_sum)


# ==============================================================================
# 11) READ ORIGINAL TEMPLATE PARAMETERS
# ==============================================================================
template_lines <- readLines(input_template, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
template_params <- extract_param_lines(template_lines)

# ==============================================================================
# 12) TABLE OF OVERRIDES / NEW PARAMS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# These values will replace the original template values
# ==============================================================================
updated_params <- tibble(
  param = c(
    "Oxyupt", "NH4upt", "NO2upt", "NO3rel", "DOCupt", "BacCupt",
    "CN_Spo", "NC_Spo", "CN_DOM", "CN_Bac", "RQ",
    "CN_DOM_min", "CN_DOM_max",
    "RQ_min", "RQ_max",
    "Oxyupt_min", "Oxyupt_max",
    "DOCupt_min", "DOCupt_max",
    "NH4upt_min", "NH4upt_max",
    "NOx_min", "NOx_max",
    "BacCupt_min", "BacCupt_max",
    "DICrel_min", "DICrel_max",
    "orig_NO2", "orig_NO3"
  ),
  value_num = c(
    o2_val$center,
    nh4_val$center,
    no2_partitioned$center,
    no3_partitioned$center,
    doc_val$center,
    bac_sum$center,

    cn_spo_info$CN_Spo,
    cn_spo_info$NC_Spo,
    cn_dom$center,
    6.6,
    rq_val$center,

    cn_dom$min,
    cn_dom$max,

    rq_val$min,
    rq_val$max,

    o2_val$min,
    o2_val$max,

    doc_val$min,
    doc_val$max,

    nh4_val$min,
    nh4_val$max,

    nox_val$min,
    nox_val$max,

    bac_sum$min,
    bac_sum$max,

    dic_val$min,
    dic_val$max,

    orig_NO2,
    orig_NO3
  ),
  comment = c(
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from summary table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from summary table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " derived from total NOx using Kluijver 2020 partition"),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " derived from total NOx using Kluijver 2020 partition"),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from summary table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " derived as Bact_C + Syn_C + Pro_C + PEuk_C + NEuk_C using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " derived from Table 3 using ", settings$cn_spo_method),
    "Derived as 1/CN_Spo",
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from ratio table using ", settings$range_method),
    "Redfield ratio",
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from ", settings$rq_parameter, " using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from ratio table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from ratio table using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from rq table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from rq table using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from summary table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from summary table using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from summary table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from summary table using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from summary table using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from summary table using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound total NOx using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound total NOx using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from cellular carbon groups using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from cellular carbon groups using ", settings$range_method),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from DIC_pH using ", settings$range_method),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from DIC_pH using ", settings$range_method),

    "Kluijver 2020 partition helper",
    "Kluijver 2020 partition helper"
  )
)

# ==============================================================================
# 13) PARTITION TOTAL NOx INTO NO2 AND NO3 CENTRAL VALUES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Keep total NOx bounds in the sampling section, but derive NO2upt and NO3rel
# central values from fixed literature-based partition helpers.
#
# IMPORTANT
# These helper values are NOT read from the original template.
# They are added later to the rebuilt input file as new parameters.
# ==============================================================================

# Literature-based helper values (Kluijver 2020)
orig_NO2 <- -0.114
orig_NO3 <- -1.356

partition_total <- abs(orig_NO2) + abs(orig_NO3)

if (!is.finite(partition_total) || partition_total == 0) {
  stop("Invalid NOx partition helpers: orig_NO2 and orig_NO3.")
}

frac_no2 <- abs(orig_NO2) / partition_total
frac_no3 <- abs(orig_NO3) / partition_total

# Partition the central total NOx value into NO2 and NO3 components
no2_partitioned <- tibble(
  parameter = "NO2upt",
  center    = nox_val$center[1] * frac_no2,
  note      = "derived from total NOx using Kluijver 2020 partition"
)

no3_partitioned <- tibble(
  parameter = "NO3rel",
  center    = nox_val$center[1] * frac_no3,
  note      = "derived from total NOx using Kluijver 2020 partition"
)

# ==============================================================================
# 14) ORDER PARAMETERS CLEANLY
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# We rebuild a clean Parameters block in a logical order
# ==============================================================================
measurement_params <- c("Oxyupt", "NH4upt", "NO2upt", "NO3rel", "DOCupt", "BacCupt")

stoich_params <- c("CN_Spo", "NC_Spo", "CN_DOM", "CN_Bac")

rate_params <- c(
  "fr_C_Bac", "fr_C_DOM", "fp_N_Bac", "fp_N_DOM",
  "fex_N_Bac", "fex_N_DOM", "RQ", "DenitEff", "DNRAeff",
  "fp_N_Denit", "fp_N_DNRA", "fex_N_Denit", "fex_N_DNRA",
  "fr_C_Denit", "fr_C_DNRA", "Cfix_nit1", "Cfix_nit2", "Cfix_ana"
)

sampling_params <- c(
  "CN_DOM_min", "CN_DOM_max",
  "RQ_min", "RQ_max",
  "Oxyupt_min", "Oxyupt_max",
  "DOCupt_min", "DOCupt_max",
  "NH4upt_min", "NH4upt_max",
  "NOx_min", "NOx_max",
  "BacCupt_min", "BacCupt_max",
  "DICrel_min", "DICrel_max"
)

helper_params <- c("orig_NO2", "orig_NO3")

# optional keep anything unexpected at the end
remaining_params <- setdiff(
  merged_params$param,
  c(measurement_params, stoich_params, rate_params, sampling_params, helper_params)
)

ordered_params <- c(
  measurement_params,
  stoich_params,
  rate_params,
  sampling_params,
  helper_params,
  remaining_params
)

merged_params <- merged_params %>%
  mutate(order_id = match(param, ordered_params)) %>%
  arrange(order_id, param)

# ==============================================================================
# 15) BUILD NEW PARAMETERS BLOCK
# ==============================================================================
build_section_lines <- function(df, section_title) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(character(0))
  c(
    section_title,
    purrr::pmap_chr(
      list(df$param, df$value_num, df$comment),
      ~ make_param_line(..1, ..2, ..3, digits = settings$out_digits)
    ),
    ""
  )
}

measurement_df <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% measurement_params)
stoich_df      <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% stoich_params)
rate_df        <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% rate_params)
sampling_df    <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% sampling_params)
helper_df      <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% helper_params)
remaining_df   <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% remaining_params)

new_parameter_block <- c(
  "## Parameters",
  build_section_lines(measurement_df, "!Measurements"),
  build_section_lines(stoich_df, "!Stoichiometry"),
  build_section_lines(rate_df, "!rates"),
  build_section_lines(sampling_df, "!sampling ranges used by R script"),
  build_section_lines(helper_df, "!helpers for NOx partition"),
  build_section_lines(remaining_df, "!additional parameters"),
  "## End parameters"
)

# ==============================================================================
# 16) KEEP REST OF TEMPLATE UNCHANGED
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Replace only the Parameters block, keep everything else identical
# ==============================================================================
start_idx <- grep("^## Parameters\\s*$", template_lines)
end_idx   <- grep("^## End parameters\\s*$", template_lines)

if (length(start_idx) != 1 || length(end_idx) != 1 || end_idx <= start_idx) {
  stop("Could not detect valid ## Parameters block in template.")
}

before_block <- template_lines[seq_len(start_idx - 1)]
after_block  <- template_lines[(end_idx + 1):length(template_lines)]

new_input_lines <- c(
  before_block,
  new_parameter_block,
  after_block
)

# ==============================================================================
# 17) VALIDATION
# ==============================================================================
required_params <- c(
  measurement_params,
  stoich_params,
  rate_params
)

defined_params <- merged_params$param

missing_required <- setdiff(required_params, defined_params)
if (length(missing_required) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required parameters after rebuild: ",
       paste(missing_required, collapse = ", "))
}

dup_params <- defined_params[duplicated(defined_params)]
if (length(dup_params) > 0) {
  stop("Duplicate parameters after rebuild: ",
       paste(unique(dup_params), collapse = ", "))
}

# ==============================================================================
# 18) SAVE PARAMETER TABLE
# ==============================================================================
write_csv(
  merged_params %>% select(param, value_num, comment),
  output_param_table
)

# ==============================================================================
# 19) WRITE NEW INPUT FILE AS UTF-8 TEXT
# ==============================================================================
new_input_lines <- enc2utf8(new_input_lines)

con <- file(output_input, open = "w", encoding = "UTF-8")
writeLines(new_input_lines, con = con, useBytes = TRUE)
close(con)

cat("\nDone.\n")
cat("Template used:\n", input_template, "\n\n")
cat("Rebuilt input file written to:\n", output_input, "\n\n")
cat("Merged parameter table written to:\n", output_param_table, "\n")


```


### REBUILD SPECIES-SPECIFIC LIM INPUT FILE

```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10}

# ==============================================================================
# REBUILD SPECIES-SPECIFIC LIM INPUT FILE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Build a new sponge-specific .input file from empirical summary tables,
# using category-based rules for parameter ranges.
#
# WHY THIS VERSION EXISTS
# The old version applied one statistical rule (e.g. median ± CI) to all
# parameters. That approach is often not appropriate for noisy variables,
# near-zero fluxes, or derived ratios.
#
# THIS VERSION ADDS
# - parameter-specific categories
# - q05/q95 support from clean summary tables
# - clean summary input file support
# - direct Kluijver-based NOx partition helpers
# - full rebuild of the ## Parameters block from template + updated values
#
# CATEGORY LOGIC
# - strong_signal : median ± CI95
# - weak_signal   : q05-q95 preferred; fallback min/max; final fallback median±CI95
# - near_zero     : center at 0, symmetric range around 0
# - derived_ratio : q05-q95 preferred; fallback median±CI95; final fallback min/max
#
# OUTPUTS
# 1) rebuilt .input file
# 2) merged parameter table
# 3) override parameter table
# 4) parameter rule audit
# ==============================================================================

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)

# ==============================================================================
# 1) SETTINGS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Centralize species-specific settings used throughout the script.
# ==============================================================================

settings <- list(
  species_full   = "Chondrosia reniformis",   # must match summary / ratio / rq tables
  species_short  = "C. reniformis",        # used for Table 3 lookup
  rq_parameter   = "RQ_model_pH",
  out_digits     = 3,

  # CN_Spo handling:
  # "table3"   = derive CN_Spo / NC_Spo from the internal Table 3 below
  # "template" = keep CN_Spo / NC_Spo from the existing template
  cn_spo_method  = "table3"
)

# ==============================================================================
# 2) FILE PATHS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Define source files and output files.
# NOTE
# summary / ratio / rq come from the shared all-species directory.
# The template comes from the original Geodia input directory.
# ==============================================================================

base_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Summary_tables/All_3_species_recalc_flux_with_all_volumes"

summary_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  "SUMMARY_CLEAN_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"
)

ratio_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  "RATIO_RANGES_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"
)

rq_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  "RQ_RANGES_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"
)

template_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Geodia barretti/4139792"

input_template <- file.path(
  template_dir,
  "MN_Gbarretti_smaller_fit.input"
)

output_input <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  paste0(
    str_replace_all(settings$species_full, " ", "_"),
    "_rule_based_rebuilt.input"
  )
)

output_param_table <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  paste0(
    str_replace_all(settings$species_full, " ", "_"),
    "_rule_based_parameter_table.csv"
  )
)

# ==============================================================================
# 3) TABLE 3 INSIDE SCRIPT
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Internal Table 3 used to derive CN_Spo and NC_Spo when
# settings$cn_spo_method == "table3".
# IMPORTANT
# Species names here are short-form, so we use settings$species_short.
# ==============================================================================

table3 <- data.frame(
  Section = c(rep("a", 15), rep("b", 15)),
  Species = c(
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara",
    "C. reniformis", "A. oroides", "P. ficiformis", "C. crambe", "D. avara"
  ),
  Metric = c(
    rep("C per area", 5),
    rep("C per volume", 5),
    rep("%C/DW", 5),
    rep("N per area", 5),
    rep("N per volume", 5),
    rep("%N/DW", 5)
  ),
  Unit = c(
    rep("mg C/cm²", 5),
    rep("mg C/cm³", 5),
    rep("%", 5),
    rep("mg N/cm²", 5),
    rep("mg N/cm³", 5),
    rep("%", 5)
  ),
  Small = c(
    "72.54 ± 14.12", "145.99 ± 117.54", "47.89 ± 23.57", "5.48 ± 2.21", "8.57 ± 4.72",
    "65.42 ± 9.53", "42.08 ± 24.71", "59.61 ± 28.77", "21.92 ± 8.84", "8.24 ± 4.54",
    "34.20 ± 2.34 %", "29.13 ± 2.55 %", "13.52 ± 0.95 %", "27.47 ± 2.54 %", "19.15 ± 2.86 %",
    "22.14 ± 4.23", "44.61 ± 34.63", "11.35 ± 6.11", "1.09 ± 0.46", "1.22 ± 0.62",
    "19.99 ± 3.09", "12.92 ± 7.11", "14.09 ± 7.54", "4.37 ± 1.85", "1.17 ± 0.60",
    "10.47 ± 0.73 %", "9.15 ± 0.75 %", "3.07 ± 0.13%", "5.39 ± 0.82%", "2.74 ± 0.57%"
  ),
  Big = c(
    "61.22 ± 6.04", "78.30 ± 41.50", "79.75 ± 11.94", "3.43 ± 2.06", "11.87 ± 3.46",
    "42.49 ± 10.80", "16.20 ± 4.98", "36.42 ± 17.32", "13.71 ± 8.22", "11.41 ± 3.32",
    NA, "30.31 ± 2.19%", NA, NA, NA,
    "18.79 ± 1.90", "24.08 ± 12.82", "19.40 ± 2.90", "0.68 ± 0.48", "1.62 ± 0.44",
    "13.03 ± 3.25", "4.97 ± 1.57", "8.90 ± 4.35", "2.72 ± 1.91", "1.56 ± 0.42",
    NA, NA, "3.35 ± 0.26%", NA, "2.61 ± 0.47%"
  ),
  p_Size = c(
    "***","**","** a","***","***",
    "***","***","***","** a","***",
    "n.s","*","n.s","n.s","n.s",
    "***","***","* a","* a","***",
    "***","***","***","** a","***",
    "n.s","n.s","***","n.s","***"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3a) Safe numeric conversion
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
safe_num <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.null(x)) return(NA_real_)
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x <- gsub(",", "", x)
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3b) Find a column by regex pattern
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
find_col <- function(df, patterns, required = TRUE) {
  nms <- names(df)

  for (pat in patterns) {
    hit <- grep(pat, nms, ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)
    if (length(hit) >= 1) {
      return(hit[1])
    }
  }

  if (required) {
    stop("Could not find required column. Patterns tried: ",
         paste(patterns, collapse = " | "))
  }

  NULL
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3c) Format parameter line for .input file
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_param_line <- function(param, value, comment = "", digits = 3) {
  value_chr <- format(round(value, digits), nsmall = digits, trim = TRUE, scientific = FALSE)

  if (!is.na(comment) && nzchar(comment)) {
    paste0(param, "\t\t=\t\t", value_chr, "\t\t!", comment)
  } else {
    paste0(param, "\t\t=\t\t", value_chr)
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3d) Extract parameter lines from ## Parameters block
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
extract_param_lines <- function(lines) {
  start_idx <- grep("^## Parameters\\s*$", lines)
  end_idx   <- grep("^## End parameters\\s*$", lines)

  if (length(start_idx) != 1 || length(end_idx) != 1 || end_idx <= start_idx) {
    stop("Could not detect a valid ## Parameters block.")
  }

  param_block <- lines[(start_idx + 1):(end_idx - 1)]

  out <- lapply(param_block, function(line) {
    line_trim <- trimws(line)

    if (!nzchar(line_trim)) return(NULL)
    if (grepl("^!", line_trim)) return(NULL)
    if (!grepl("=", line_trim, fixed = TRUE)) return(NULL)

    parts <- strsplit(line, "!", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    left  <- parts[1]
    cmt   <- if (length(parts) >= 2) paste(parts[-1], collapse = "!") else ""

    eq_parts <- strsplit(left, "=", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    if (length(eq_parts) < 2) return(NULL)

    param_name <- trimws(eq_parts[1])
    value_chr  <- trimws(eq_parts[2])

    tibble(
      param     = param_name,
      value_chr = value_chr,
      value_num = safe_num(value_chr),
      comment   = trimws(cmt)
    )
  })

  bind_rows(out)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3e) Pull one numeric value from one-row table
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
pull_num_or_na <- function(row, col_name) {
  if (is.null(col_name) || is.na(col_name) || !col_name %in% names(row)) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  safe_num(row[[col_name]][1])
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3f) Parse "mean ± sd" strings from Table 3
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
parse_mean_pm <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || x == "") return(NA_real_)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "%", "")
  x <- str_squish(x)
  parts <- strsplit(x, "±", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  safe_num(parts[1])
}

# ==============================================================================
# 4) READ SOURCE FILES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Read the empirical summary / ratio / RQ tables and keep only the rows that
# belong to the selected species.
# ==============================================================================

summary_df <- read_csv(summary_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
ratio_df   <- read_csv(ratio_file,   show_col_types = FALSE)
rq_df      <- read_csv(rq_file,      show_col_types = FALSE)

required_summary_cols <- c("species", "parameter")
required_ratio_cols   <- c("species", "parameter")
required_rq_cols      <- c("species", "parameter")

missing_summary <- setdiff(required_summary_cols, names(summary_df))
missing_ratio   <- setdiff(required_ratio_cols,   names(ratio_df))
missing_rq      <- setdiff(required_rq_cols,      names(rq_df))

if (length(missing_summary) > 0) {
  stop("Summary file is missing required columns: ",
       paste(missing_summary, collapse = ", "))
}
if (length(missing_ratio) > 0) {
  stop("Ratio file is missing required columns: ",
       paste(missing_ratio, collapse = ", "))
}
if (length(missing_rq) > 0) {
  stop("RQ file is missing required columns: ",
       paste(missing_rq, collapse = ", "))
}

summary_sp <- summary_df %>% filter(species == settings$species_full)
ratio_sp   <- ratio_df   %>% filter(species == settings$species_full)
rq_sp      <- rq_df      %>% filter(species == settings$species_full)

if (nrow(summary_sp) == 0) stop("No rows found in summary file for species: ", settings$species_full)
if (nrow(ratio_sp)   == 0) stop("No rows found in ratio file for species: ", settings$species_full)
if (nrow(rq_sp)      == 0) stop("No rows found in RQ file for species: ", settings$species_full)

cat("\nSummary species found:\n")
print(unique(summary_sp$species))
cat("\nRatio species found:\n")
print(unique(ratio_sp$species))
cat("\nRQ species found:\n")
print(unique(rq_sp$species))

cat("\nNumber of rows kept:\n")
cat("summary_sp:", nrow(summary_sp), "\n")
cat("ratio_sp  :", nrow(ratio_sp), "\n")
cat("rq_sp     :", nrow(rq_sp), "\n")

# ==============================================================================
# 5) READ INPUT TEMPLATE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Read the original .input template and extract the existing Parameters block.
# ==============================================================================

template_lines  <- readLines(input_template, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
template_params <- extract_param_lines(template_lines)

if (nrow(template_params) == 0) {
  stop("No parameter lines extracted from template: ", input_template)
}

# ==============================================================================
# 6) DETECT NUMERIC COLUMNS IN SOURCE TABLES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Detect the numeric columns used for rule-based parameter extraction.
# ==============================================================================

summary_median_col <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^median$"))
summary_mean_col   <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^mean$"), required = FALSE)
summary_ci_col     <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^ci95$"))
summary_min_col    <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^min$"))
summary_max_col    <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^max$"))
summary_q05_col    <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^q05$", "^Q05$"), required = FALSE)
summary_q95_col    <- find_col(summary_sp, c("^q95$", "^Q95$"), required = FALSE)

ratio_median_col <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^median$"))
ratio_mean_col   <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^mean$"), required = FALSE)
ratio_ci_col     <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^ci95$"))
ratio_min_col    <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^min$"))
ratio_max_col    <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^max$"))
ratio_q05_col    <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^q05$", "^Q05$"), required = FALSE)
ratio_q95_col    <- find_col(ratio_sp, c("^q95$", "^Q95$"), required = FALSE)

rq_median_col <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^median$"))
rq_mean_col   <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^mean$"), required = FALSE)
rq_ci_col     <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^ci95$"))
rq_min_col    <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^min$"))
rq_max_col    <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^max$"))
rq_q05_col    <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^q05$", "^Q05$"), required = FALSE)
rq_q95_col    <- find_col(rq_sp, c("^q95$", "^Q95$"), required = FALSE)

if (is.null(summary_q05_col) || is.null(summary_q95_col)) {
  message("Summary clean table does not contain q05/q95. weak_signal summary variables will fall back to min/max.")
}
if (is.null(ratio_q05_col) || is.null(ratio_q95_col)) {
  message("Ratio table does not contain q05/q95. derived_ratio variables may fall back to median±CI95 or min/max.")
}
if (is.null(rq_q05_col) || is.null(rq_q95_col)) {
  message("RQ table does not contain q05/q95. RQ may fall back to median±CI95 or min/max.")
}

cat("\nDetected columns:\n")
cat("summary -> mean:", summary_mean_col,
    "| median:", summary_median_col,
    "| ci95:", summary_ci_col,
    "| min:", summary_min_col,
    "| max:", summary_max_col,
    "| q05:", summary_q05_col,
    "| q95:", summary_q95_col, "\n")

cat("ratio   -> mean:", ratio_mean_col,
    "| median:", ratio_median_col,
    "| ci95:", ratio_ci_col,
    "| min:", ratio_min_col,
    "| max:", ratio_max_col,
    "| q05:", ratio_q05_col,
    "| q95:", ratio_q95_col, "\n")

cat("rq      -> mean:", rq_mean_col,
    "| median:", rq_median_col,
    "| ci95:", rq_ci_col,
    "| min:", rq_min_col,
    "| max:", rq_max_col,
    "| q05:", rq_q05_col,
    "| q95:", rq_q95_col, "\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# 7) AUTOMATIC PARAMETER CLASSIFICATION
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Automatically assign each parameter to:
# - source_type   : summary / ratio / rq
# - category      : derived_ratio / near_zero / strong_signal / weak_signal
# - non_negative  : TRUE / FALSE
# based on the empirical distribution itself.
# ==============================================================================

get_source_table_info <- function(param_name) {

  in_summary <- param_name %in% summary_sp$parameter
  in_ratio   <- param_name %in% ratio_sp$parameter
  in_rq      <- param_name %in% rq_sp$parameter

  n_sources <- sum(in_summary, in_ratio, in_rq)

  if (n_sources == 0) {
    stop("Parameter not found in any source table: ", param_name)
  }

  if (n_sources > 1) {
    stop("Parameter found in more than one source table: ", param_name)
  }

  if (in_summary) {
    return(list(
      source_type = "summary",
      row         = summary_sp %>% filter(parameter == param_name),
      median_col  = summary_median_col,
      mean_col    = summary_mean_col,
      ci_col      = summary_ci_col,
      min_col     = summary_min_col,
      max_col     = summary_max_col,
      q05_col     = summary_q05_col,
      q95_col     = summary_q95_col
    ))
  }

  if (in_ratio) {
    return(list(
      source_type = "ratio",
      row         = ratio_sp %>% filter(parameter == param_name),
      median_col  = ratio_median_col,
      mean_col    = ratio_mean_col,
      ci_col      = ratio_ci_col,
      min_col     = ratio_min_col,
      max_col     = ratio_max_col,
      q05_col     = ratio_q05_col,
      q95_col     = ratio_q95_col
    ))
  }

  if (in_rq) {
    return(list(
      source_type = "rq",
      row         = rq_sp %>% filter(parameter == param_name),
      median_col  = rq_median_col,
      mean_col    = rq_mean_col,
      ci_col      = rq_ci_col,
      min_col     = rq_min_col,
      max_col     = rq_max_col,
      q05_col     = rq_q05_col,
      q95_col     = rq_q95_col
    ))
  }

  stop("Unexpected source detection failure for: ", param_name)
}

classify_parameter_from_row <- function(row,
                                        param_name,
                                        source_type,
                                        median_col = NULL,
                                        mean_col   = NULL,
                                        ci_col     = NULL,
                                        min_col    = NULL,
                                        max_col    = NULL,
                                        q05_col    = NULL,
                                        q95_col    = NULL,
                                        signal_ratio_cutoff = 2) {
  if (nrow(row) != 1) {
    stop("Expected exactly one row for parameter: ", param_name,
         ". Got: ", nrow(row))
  }

  median_val <- pull_num_or_na(row, median_col)
  ci_val     <- pull_num_or_na(row, ci_col)
  min_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, min_col)
  max_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, max_col)
  q05_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, q05_col)
  q95_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, q95_col)

  low  <- dplyr::coalesce(q05_val, min_val)
  high <- dplyr::coalesce(q95_val, max_val)

  is_ratio <- source_type %in% c("ratio", "rq") ||
    stringr::str_detect(param_name, "CN|RQ|ratio")

  crosses_zero <- !is.na(low) && !is.na(high) && low < 0 && high > 0

  signal_ratio <- ifelse(
    is.na(ci_val) || ci_val == 0 || is.na(median_val),
    NA_real_,
    abs(median_val) / ci_val
  )

  category <- dplyr::case_when(
    is_ratio ~ "derived_ratio",
    crosses_zero ~ "near_zero",
    !is.na(signal_ratio) && signal_ratio >= signal_ratio_cutoff ~ "strong_signal",
    TRUE ~ "weak_signal"
  )

  non_negative <- !is.na(low) && low >= 0

  tibble(
    parameter      = param_name,
    source_type    = source_type,
    category       = category,
    is_ratio       = is_ratio,
    low            = low,
    high           = high,
    crosses_zero   = crosses_zero,
    signal_ratio   = signal_ratio,
    non_negative   = non_negative
  )
}

get_param_rule <- function(param_name) {
  src <- get_source_table_info(param_name)

  classify_parameter_from_row(
    row         = src$row,
    param_name  = param_name,
    source_type = src$source_type,
    median_col  = src$median_col,
    mean_col    = src$mean_col,
    ci_col      = src$ci_col,
    min_col     = src$min_col,
    max_col     = src$max_col,
    q05_col     = src$q05_col,
    q95_col     = src$q95_col
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# 8) CONVERT CATEGORY TO CENTER / MIN / MAX
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Given one parameter row and its assigned category, calculate:
# - center
# - min
# - max
# - rule_used
#
# CATEGORY LOGIC
# - strong_signal  : prefer median ± CI, fallback to mean ± CI, fallback to q05-q95
# - weak_signal    : prefer q05-q95, fallback to min-max, fallback to median ± CI
# - near_zero      : build a symmetric range around zero using the largest absolute
#                    bound from q05/q95 or min/max
# - derived_ratio  : prefer q05-q95, fallback to median ± CI, fallback to min-max
#
# NEW:
# - non_negative flag can force the final center/min/max to stay >= 0
# ==============================================================================

get_center_and_range_by_rule <- function(row,
                                         category,
                                         non_negative = FALSE,
                                         median_col = NULL,
                                         mean_col   = NULL,
                                         ci_col     = NULL,
                                         min_col    = NULL,
                                         max_col    = NULL,
                                         q05_col    = NULL,
                                         q95_col    = NULL) {

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Pull numeric values safely
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
```
