```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10}
  median_val <- pull_num_or_na(row, median_col)
  mean_val   <- pull_num_or_na(row, mean_col)
  ci_val     <- pull_num_or_na(row, ci_col)
  min_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, min_col)
  max_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, max_col)
  q05_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, q05_col)
  q95_val    <- pull_num_or_na(row, q95_col)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Helper: apply non-negative constraint if requested
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  apply_non_negative <- function(res, non_negative) {
    if (isTRUE(non_negative)) {
      res$min    <- max(0, res$min)
      res$max    <- max(0, res$max)
      res$center <- max(0, res$center)
      res$rule_used <- paste0(res$rule_used, "_non_negative")
    }
    return(res)
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # 1) strong_signal
  # Prefer median ± CI
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  if (category == "strong_signal") {

    if (!is.na(median_val) && !is.na(ci_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = median_val,
        min       = median_val - ci_val,
        max       = median_val + ci_val,
        rule_used = "median_ci"
      ), non_negative))
    }

    if (!is.na(mean_val) && !is.na(ci_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = mean_val,
        min       = mean_val - ci_val,
        max       = mean_val + ci_val,
        rule_used = "mean_ci"
      ), non_negative))
    }

    if (!is.na(q05_val) && !is.na(q95_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = (q05_val + q95_val) / 2,
        min       = q05_val,
        max       = q95_val,
        rule_used = "q05_q95_fallback"
      ), non_negative))
    }
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # 2) weak_signal
  # Prefer q05-q95 because CI may under-represent spread in noisy parameters
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  if (category == "weak_signal") {

    if (!is.na(q05_val) && !is.na(q95_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = (q05_val + q95_val) / 2,
        min       = q05_val,
        max       = q95_val,
        rule_used = "q05_q95"
      ), non_negative))
    }

    if (!is.na(min_val) && !is.na(max_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = (min_val + max_val) / 2,
        min       = min_val,
        max       = max_val,
        rule_used = "min_max_fallback"
      ), non_negative))
    }

    if (!is.na(median_val) && !is.na(ci_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = median_val,
        min       = median_val - ci_val,
        max       = median_val + ci_val,
        rule_used = "median_ci_fallback"
      ), non_negative))
    }
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # 3) near_zero
  # Force a symmetric range around zero
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  if (category == "near_zero") {

    low  <- dplyr::coalesce(q05_val, min_val)
    high <- dplyr::coalesce(q95_val, max_val)

    if (!is.na(low) && !is.na(high)) {
      max_abs <- max(abs(low), abs(high))

      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = 0,
        min       = -max_abs,
        max       =  max_abs,
        rule_used = "symmetric_zero"
      ), non_negative))
    }

    if (!is.na(median_val) && !is.na(ci_val)) {
      max_abs <- abs(median_val) + ci_val

      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = 0,
        min       = -max_abs,
        max       =  max_abs,
        rule_used = "symmetric_zero_from_median_ci"
      ), non_negative))
    }
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # 4) derived_ratio
  # Prefer quantile range because ratios are often skewed
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  if (category == "derived_ratio") {

    if (!is.na(q05_val) && !is.na(q95_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = (q05_val + q95_val) / 2,
        min       = q05_val,
        max       = q95_val,
        rule_used = "q05_q95_ratio"
      ), non_negative))
    }

    if (!is.na(median_val) && !is.na(ci_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = median_val,
        min       = median_val - ci_val,
        max       = median_val + ci_val,
        rule_used = "median_ci_ratio_fallback"
      ), non_negative))
    }

    if (!is.na(min_val) && !is.na(max_val)) {
      return(apply_non_negative(list(
        center    = (min_val + max_val) / 2,
        min       = min_val,
        max       = max_val,
        rule_used = "min_max_ratio_fallback"
      ), non_negative))
    }
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # If nothing matched, stop with a clear error
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  stop(
    "Could not determine center/min/max for category '", category,
    "'. Check available columns and missing values."
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# 9) GENERIC PARAMETER EXTRACTION
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Pull one parameter from its source table, classify it automatically,
# and apply the matching center/range rule.
# ==============================================================================

extract_param_by_rule <- function(param_name) {
  rule_row <- get_param_rule(param_name)

  category     <- rule_row$category[1]
  src_type     <- rule_row$source_type[1]
  non_negative <- rule_row$non_negative[1]

  src <- get_source_table_info(param_name)
  row <- src$row

  res <- get_center_and_range_by_rule(
    row          = row,
    category     = category,
    non_negative = non_negative,
    median_col   = src$median_col,
    mean_col     = src$mean_col,
    ci_col       = src$ci_col,
    min_col      = src$min_col,
    max_col      = src$max_col,
    q05_col      = src$q05_col,
    q95_col      = src$q95_col
  )

  tibble(
    parameter      = param_name,
    center         = res$center,
    min            = res$min,
    max            = res$max,
    category       = category,
    source         = src_type,
    rule_used      = res$rule_used,
    signal_ratio   = rule_row$signal_ratio[1],
    crosses_zero   = rule_row$crosses_zero[1],
    low            = rule_row$low[1],
    high           = rule_row$high[1],
    non_negative   = non_negative
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# 10) CN_Spo / NC_Spo
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Decide whether CN_Spo / NC_Spo come from the template or from Table 3.
# IMPORTANT
# For method == "table3", CN_Spo is calculated as:
#   (C per volume) / (N per volume)
# using the SMALL size class values.
# ==============================================================================

get_cn_spo_info <- function(template_params, method = "template", species_short = NULL) {

  if (method == "template") {
    cn_row <- template_params %>% filter(param == "CN_Spo")
    nc_row <- template_params %>% filter(param == "NC_Spo")

    if (nrow(cn_row) != 1 || nrow(nc_row) != 1) {
      stop("Could not find CN_Spo / NC_Spo in template.")
    }

    return(list(
      CN_Spo = safe_num(cn_row$value_num[1]),
      NC_Spo = safe_num(nc_row$value_num[1])
    ))
  }

  if (method == "table3") {
    c_row <- table3 %>%
      filter(Species == species_short, Metric == "C per volume")

    n_row <- table3 %>%
      filter(Species == species_short, Metric == "N per volume")

    if (nrow(c_row) != 1) stop("Expected exactly one Table 3 C row for species: ", species_short)
    if (nrow(n_row) != 1) stop("Expected exactly one Table 3 N row for species: ", species_short)

    c_val <- parse_mean_pm(c_row$Small[1])
    n_val <- parse_mean_pm(n_row$Small[1])

    if (is.na(c_val) || is.na(n_val) || c_val <= 0 || n_val <= 0) {
      stop("Invalid CN_Spo values extracted from table3.")
    }

    cn_spo <- c_val / n_val

    return(list(
      CN_Spo = cn_spo,
      NC_Spo = 1 / cn_spo
    ))
  }

  stop("Unknown cn_spo_method: ", method)
}

cn_spo_info <- get_cn_spo_info(
  template_params = template_params,
  method          = settings$cn_spo_method,
  species_short   = settings$species_short
)

# ==============================================================================
# 11) EXTRACT CORE PARAMETERS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Extract main measured / derived values used in the model.
# ==============================================================================

o2_val   <- extract_param_by_rule("O2")
doc_val  <- extract_param_by_rule("DOC")
nh4_val  <- extract_param_by_rule("NH4")
nox_val  <- extract_param_by_rule("NOx")
dic_val  <- extract_param_by_rule("DIC_pH")
cn_dom   <- extract_param_by_rule("CN_DOM")
rq_val   <- extract_param_by_rule(settings$rq_parameter)

# ==============================================================================
# 12) BUILD BacCupt AND BacNupt
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Build total bacterial/particulate uptake from component-wise parameters.
# Each component is first converted using its own category rule.
# ==============================================================================

available_params <- summary_sp %>% distinct(parameter) %>% pull(parameter)

bacC_requested <- c("Bact_C", "Syn_C", "Pro_C", "PEuk_C", "NEuk_C")
bacN_requested <- c("Bact_N", "Syn_N", "Pro_N", "PEuk_N", "NEuk_N")

bacC_used <- intersect(bacC_requested, available_params)
bacN_used <- intersect(bacN_requested, available_params)

if (length(bacC_used) == 0) stop("No bacteria C components found in summary_sp.")
if (length(bacN_used) == 0) stop("No bacteria N components found in summary_sp.")

bacC_parts <- purrr::map_dfr(bacC_used, extract_param_by_rule)
bacN_parts <- purrr::map_dfr(bacN_used, extract_param_by_rule)

bac_sum <- tibble(
  parameter = "BacCupt",
  center    = sum(bacC_parts$center, na.rm = TRUE),
  min       = sum(bacC_parts$min,    na.rm = TRUE),
  max       = sum(bacC_parts$max,    na.rm = TRUE),
  category  = "derived_sum",
  source    = "summary",
  rule_used = "sum_of_component_ranges"
)

bacN_sum <- tibble(
  parameter = "BacNupt",
  center    = sum(bacN_parts$center, na.rm = TRUE),
  min       = sum(bacN_parts$min,    na.rm = TRUE),
  max       = sum(bacN_parts$max,    na.rm = TRUE),
  category  = "derived_sum",
  source    = "summary",
  rule_used = "sum_of_component_ranges"
)

# ==============================================================================
# 13) PARTITION TOTAL NOx INTO NO2 AND NO3 CENTRAL VALUES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Keep total NOx bounds in the sampling section, but derive NO2upt and NO3rel
# central values from fixed literature-based partition helpers.
# IMPORTANT
# These helper values are NOT read from the original template.
# ==============================================================================

orig_NO2 <- -0.114
orig_NO3 <- -1.356

partition_total <- abs(orig_NO2) + abs(orig_NO3)

if (!is.finite(partition_total) || partition_total == 0) {
  stop("Invalid NOx partition helpers.")
}

frac_no2 <- abs(orig_NO2) / partition_total
frac_no3 <- abs(orig_NO3) / partition_total

no2_partitioned <- tibble(
  parameter = "NO2upt",
  center    = nox_val$center[1] * frac_no2,
  note      = "derived from total NOx using Kluijver 2020 partition"
)

no3_partitioned <- tibble(
  parameter = "NO3rel",
  center    = nox_val$center[1] * frac_no3,
  note      = "derived from total NOx using Kluijver 2020 partition"
)

# ==============================================================================
# 14) PARAMETER RULE AUDIT
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Save a transparent table showing which rule was used for each parameter.
# ==============================================================================
rule_audit <- bind_rows(
  o2_val,
  doc_val,
  nh4_val,
  nox_val,
  dic_val,
  cn_dom,
  rq_val,
  bacC_parts,
  bacN_parts,
  bac_sum,
  bacN_sum
) %>%
  arrange(source, category, parameter) %>%
  select(parameter, source, category, rule_used,
         center, min, max,
         low, high,
         signal_ratio, crosses_zero, non_negative,
         everything())


audit_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  paste0(str_replace_all(settings$species_full, " ", "_"), "_parameter_rule_audit.csv")
)

write_csv(rule_audit, audit_file)

# ==============================================================================
# 15) BUILD UPDATED PARAMETER TABLE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Convert extracted empirical values into the exact parameter names used by
# the LIM .input file.
# ==============================================================================

updated_params <- tibble(
  param = c(
    "Oxyupt", "NH4upt", "NO2upt", "NO3rel", "DOCupt", "BacCupt",
    "CN_Spo", "NC_Spo", "CN_DOM", "CN_Bac", "RQ",
    "CN_DOM_min", "CN_DOM_max",
    "RQ_min", "RQ_max",
    "Oxyupt_min", "Oxyupt_max",
    "DOCupt_min", "DOCupt_max",
    "NH4upt_min", "NH4upt_max",
    "NOx_min", "NOx_max",
    "BacCupt_min", "BacCupt_max",
    "DICrel_min", "DICrel_max",
    "orig_NO2", "orig_NO3"
  ),
  value_num = c(
    o2_val$center[1],
    nh4_val$center[1],
    no2_partitioned$center[1],
    no3_partitioned$center[1],
    doc_val$center[1],
    bac_sum$center[1],

    cn_spo_info$CN_Spo,
    cn_spo_info$NC_Spo,
    cn_dom$center[1],
    6.6,
    rq_val$center[1],

    cn_dom$min[1],
    cn_dom$max[1],

    rq_val$min[1],
    rq_val$max[1],

    o2_val$min[1],
    o2_val$max[1],

    doc_val$min[1],
    doc_val$max[1],

    nh4_val$min[1],
    nh4_val$max[1],

    nox_val$min[1],
    nox_val$max[1],

    bac_sum$min[1],
    bac_sum$max[1],

    dic_val$min[1],
    dic_val$max[1],

    orig_NO2,
    orig_NO3
  ),
  comment = c(
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from summary table using ", o2_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from summary table using ", nh4_val$rule_used[1]),
    no2_partitioned$note[1],
    no3_partitioned$note[1],
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from summary table using ", doc_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " derived as Bact_C + Syn_C + Pro_C + PEuk_C + NEuk_C using component-wise rules"),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " CN_Spo from ", settings$cn_spo_method),
    "Derived as 1/CN_Spo",
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from ratio table using ", cn_dom$rule_used[1]),
    "Redfield ratio",
    paste0(settings$species_full, " central value from ", settings$rq_parameter, " using ", rq_val$rule_used[1]),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from ratio table using ", cn_dom$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from ratio table using ", cn_dom$rule_used[1]),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from rq table using ", rq_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from rq table using ", rq_val$rule_used[1]),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from summary table using ", o2_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from summary table using ", o2_val$rule_used[1]),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from summary table using ", doc_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from summary table using ", doc_val$rule_used[1]),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from summary table using ", nh4_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from summary table using ", nh4_val$rule_used[1]),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound total NOx using ", nox_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound total NOx using ", nox_val$rule_used[1]),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from cellular carbon groups using component-wise rules"),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from cellular carbon groups using component-wise rules"),

    paste0(settings$species_full, " lower bound from DIC_pH using ", dic_val$rule_used[1]),
    paste0(settings$species_full, " upper bound from DIC_pH using ", dic_val$rule_used[1]),

    "Kluijver 2020 partition helper",
    "Kluijver 2020 partition helper"
  )
)

param_table_file <- file.path(
  base_dir,
  paste0(str_replace_all(settings$species_full, " ", "_"), "_parameter_table.csv")
)

write_csv(updated_params, param_table_file)

# ==============================================================================
# 16) MERGE TEMPLATE PARAMETERS WITH UPDATED PARAMETERS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Keep all template parameters unless explicitly replaced.
# Add new parameters if they did not exist in the template.
# ==============================================================================

merged_params <- template_params %>%
  select(param, value_num, comment) %>%
  distinct(param, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  rows_update(updated_params, by = "param", unmatched = "ignore") %>%
  bind_rows(updated_params %>% filter(!param %in% template_params$param)) %>%
  distinct(param, .keep_all = TRUE)

# ==============================================================================
# 17) ORDER PARAMETERS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Rebuild the Parameters block in a clean and readable order.
# ==============================================================================

measurement_params <- c("Oxyupt", "NH4upt", "NO2upt", "NO3rel", "DOCupt", "BacCupt")

stoich_params <- c("CN_Spo", "NC_Spo", "CN_DOM", "CN_Bac")

rate_params <- c(
  "fr_C_Bac", "fr_C_DOM", "fp_N_Bac", "fp_N_DOM",
  "fex_N_Bac", "fex_N_DOM", "RQ", "DenitEff", "DNRAeff",
  "fp_N_Denit", "fp_N_DNRA", "fex_N_Denit", "fex_N_DNRA",
  "fr_C_Denit", "fr_C_DNRA", "Cfix_nit1", "Cfix_nit2", "Cfix_ana"
)

sampling_params <- c(
  "CN_DOM_min", "CN_DOM_max",
  "RQ_min", "RQ_max",
  "Oxyupt_min", "Oxyupt_max",
  "DOCupt_min", "DOCupt_max",
  "NH4upt_min", "NH4upt_max",
  "NOx_min", "NOx_max",
  "BacCupt_min", "BacCupt_max",
  "DICrel_min", "DICrel_max"
)

helper_params <- c("orig_NO2", "orig_NO3")

remaining_params <- setdiff(
  merged_params$param,
  c(measurement_params, stoich_params, rate_params, sampling_params, helper_params)
)

ordered_params <- c(
  measurement_params,
  stoich_params,
  rate_params,
  sampling_params,
  helper_params,
  remaining_params
)

merged_params <- merged_params %>%
  mutate(order_id = match(param, ordered_params)) %>%
  arrange(order_id, param)

# ==============================================================================
# 18) BUILD NEW PARAMETERS BLOCK
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Convert the merged parameter table back into formatted .input lines.
# ==============================================================================

build_section_lines <- function(df, section_title) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(character(0))

  c(
    section_title,
    purrr::pmap_chr(
      list(df$param, df$value_num, df$comment),
      ~ make_param_line(..1, ..2, ..3, digits = settings$out_digits)
    ),
    ""
  )
}

measurement_df <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% measurement_params)
stoich_df      <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% stoich_params)
rate_df        <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% rate_params)
sampling_df    <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% sampling_params)
helper_df      <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% helper_params)
remaining_df   <- merged_params %>% filter(param %in% remaining_params)

new_parameter_block <- c(
  "## Parameters",
  build_section_lines(measurement_df, "!Measurements"),
  build_section_lines(stoich_df,      "!Stoichiometry"),
  build_section_lines(rate_df,        "!rates"),
  build_section_lines(sampling_df,    "!sampling ranges used by R script"),
  build_section_lines(helper_df,      "!helpers for NOx partition"),
  build_section_lines(remaining_df,   "!additional parameters"),
  "## End parameters"
)

# ==============================================================================
# 19) REPLACE ONLY THE PARAMETERS BLOCK
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Keep the rest of the template unchanged.
# ==============================================================================

start_idx <- grep("^## Parameters\\s*$", template_lines)
end_idx   <- grep("^## End parameters\\s*$", template_lines)

if (length(start_idx) != 1 || length(end_idx) != 1 || end_idx <= start_idx) {
  stop("Could not detect valid ## Parameters block in template.")
}

before_block <- template_lines[seq_len(start_idx - 1)]
after_block  <- template_lines[(end_idx + 1):length(template_lines)]

new_input_lines <- c(
  before_block,
  new_parameter_block,
  after_block
)

# ==============================================================================
# 20) VALIDATION
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Check that the rebuilt parameter table is internally consistent.
# ==============================================================================

required_params <- c(measurement_params, stoich_params, rate_params)

defined_params <- merged_params$param

missing_required <- setdiff(required_params, defined_params)
if (length(missing_required) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required parameters after rebuild: ",
       paste(missing_required, collapse = ", "))
}

dup_params <- defined_params[duplicated(defined_params)]
if (length(dup_params) > 0) {
  stop("Duplicate parameters after rebuild: ",
       paste(unique(dup_params), collapse = ", "))
}

# ==============================================================================
# 21) SAVE MERGED PARAMETER TABLE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Save the final parameter table actually used in the rebuilt input.
# ==============================================================================

write_csv(
  merged_params %>% select(param, value_num, comment),
  output_param_table
)

# ==============================================================================
# 22) WRITE NEW INPUT FILE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Write the final rebuilt template to disk as UTF-8.
# ==============================================================================

new_input_lines <- enc2utf8(new_input_lines)

con <- file(output_input, open = "w", encoding = "UTF-8")
writeLines(new_input_lines, con = con, useBytes = TRUE)
close(con)

cat("\nDone.\n")
cat("Template used:\n", input_template, "\n\n")
cat("Rebuilt input file written to:\n", output_input, "\n\n")
cat("Merged parameter table written to:\n", output_param_table, "\n")
cat("Rule audit written to:\n", audit_file, "\n")
cat("Override parameter table written to:\n", param_table_file, "\n")

```


### Delta vs IN (Ambient) — colored trend lines + equation + R² per panel

```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10}
################################################################################
# Delta vs IN (Ambient) — from RAW table (raw_individual_tbl_num)  ✅
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 0) Settings
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Community_Flux/Figures_Flux_All"
out_dir <- normalizePath(out_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

fig_prefix <- "Delta_vs_IN_HMA_LMA_sigOnly_BH_fromRAW"
alpha <- 0.05

stopifnot(exists("raw_individual_tbl_num"))  # ✅ חייב לבוא מהצ’אנק החדש שלך

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Add HMA/LMA mapping
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
hma_map <- tribble(
  ~species,                 ~HMA_LMA,
  "Agelas oroides",         "HMA",
  "Chondrosia reniformis",  "HMA",
  "Dysidea avara",          "LMA"
)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Build df_plot DIRECTLY from the RAW table  ✅ no joins, no many-to-many
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# choose which parameters you want in this plot:
solutes_keep <- c("O2", "DIC_pH", "NOx", "NH4", "DIN", "PO4", "DOC", "TN")

df_plot <- raw_individual_tbl_num %>%
  mutate(
    parameter   = str_trim(as.character(parameter)),
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = as.character(species)
  ) %>%
  filter(parameter %in% solutes_keep) %>%
  transmute(
    unique_code,
    species,
    Solute      = parameter,
    IN_umol_L   = IN,
    Delta_umol_L = Delta
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(IN_umol_L), is.finite(Delta_umol_L)) %>%
  left_join(hma_map, by = "species") %>%
  mutate(
    HMA_LMA = factor(HMA_LMA, levels = c("LMA", "HMA")),
    Solute  = factor(Solute, levels = solutes_keep)
  )



# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Facet labels (nice math)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
facet_labels <- c(
  O2      = expression(Delta*O[2]~"(IN-EX)"),
  DIC_pH  = expression(Delta*DIC[pH]~"(IN-EX)"),
  NOx     = expression(Delta*NO[x]~"(IN-EX)"),
  NH4     = expression(Delta*NH[4]~"(IN-EX)"),
  DIN     = expression(Delta*DIN~"(IN-EX)"),
  PO4     = expression(Delta*PO[4]~"(IN-EX)"),
  DOC     = expression(Delta*DOC~"(IN-EX)"),
  TN      = expression(Delta*TN~"(IN-EX)")
)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Fit models per Solute × HMA/LMA + BH(FDR)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
df_models <- df_plot %>%
  filter(!is.na(HMA_LMA)) %>%
  group_by(Solute, HMA_LMA) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    n = map_int(data, nrow),
    fit = map(data, ~ if (nrow(.x) >= 3) lm(Delta_umol_L ~ IN_umol_L, data = .x) else NULL),
    p_slope = map_dbl(fit, ~ {
      if (is.null(.x)) return(NA_real_)
      broom::tidy(.x) %>%
        filter(term == "IN_umol_L") %>%
        pull(p.value) %>%
        .[1]
    })
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_slope, method = "BH"),
    sig = !is.na(p_adj) & p_adj < alpha
  )

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) Prediction lines ONLY for significant groups
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
pred_df <- df_models %>%
  filter(sig, !is.null(fit)) %>%
  mutate(
    x_min = map_dbl(data, ~ min(.x$IN_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE)),
    x_max = map_dbl(data, ~ max(.x$IN_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE)),
    grid  = map2(x_min, x_max, ~ seq(.x, .y, length.out = 80)),
    yhat  = map2(fit, grid, ~ predict(.x, newdata = data.frame(IN_umol_L = .y))),
    pred  = map2(grid, yhat, ~ tibble(IN_umol_L = .x, Delta_umol_L = .y))
  ) %>%
  select(Solute, HMA_LMA, pred) %>%
  unnest(pred)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Equation labels ONLY for significant lines
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
eq_df <- df_models %>%
  filter(sig, !is.null(fit)) %>%
  mutate(
    coef = map(fit, ~ coef(.x)),
    m = map_dbl(coef, ~ .x[["IN_umol_L"]]),
    b = map_dbl(coef, ~ .x[["(Intercept)"]]),
    r2 = map_dbl(fit, ~ summary(.x)$r.squared),
    label = paste0("y = ", signif(m, 3), "x + ", signif(b, 3),
                   "\nR² = ", signif(r2, 3),
                   "\nBH p = ", signif(p_adj, 3))
  ) %>%
  select(Solute, HMA_LMA, label)

pos_df <- df_plot %>%
  group_by(Solute) %>%
  summarise(
    x_min = min(IN_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    x_max = max(IN_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_min = min(Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_max = max(Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x = x_min + 0.03 * (x_max - x_min),
    y_top = y_max - 0.03 * (y_max - y_min),
    y_step = 0.18 * (y_max - y_min)
  )

eq_df2 <- eq_df %>%
  left_join(pos_df, by = "Solute") %>%
  arrange(Solute, HMA_LMA) %>%
  group_by(Solute) %>%
  mutate(
    idx = row_number(),
    y = y_top - (idx - 1) * y_step
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Plot
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
pal_hma <- c("LMA" = "#8da0cb", "HMA" = "#fc8d62")

p_delta_in <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = IN_umol_L, y = Delta_umol_L, color = HMA_LMA)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65, size = 2) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_df,
    aes(x = IN_umol_L, y = Delta_umol_L, color = HMA_LMA),
    linewidth = 1.0,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = eq_df2,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = HMA_LMA),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
    size = 3.4
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Solute, scales = "free",
             labeller = as_labeller(facet_labels, default = label_parsed)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_hma, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Delta (IN−EX) vs Ambient concentration (IN)",
    subtitle = paste0("Data source: raw_individual_tbl_num (after exclusions). ",
                      "Lines/eq only when slope sig after BH(FDR), alpha=", alpha),
    x = expression(IN~concentration~(mu*mol~L^-1)),
    y = expression(Delta~(IN-EX)~(mu*mol~L^-1)),
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )

p_delta_in

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, paste0(fig_prefix, ".png")),
  plot = p_delta_in,
  width = 34, height = 22, units = "cm", dpi = 300
)
```

## ENERGY BUDGET
### ENERGY BUDGET – Figure per Unique_code
```{r, fig.width=20, fig.height=10}
################################################################################
# ENERGY BUDGET – Figure per Unique_code  ✅ 3 BARS PER CODE (Uptake | ΔO2 | Release)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Source of truth:
#   raw_individual_tbl_num  (unique_code, species, parameter, IN, EX, Delta, ...)
#
# What this chunk does:
#   1) Builds components from ROW:
#        - FCM taxa: (Bact/Pro/Syn/Euk/PEuk/NEuk)_(C|N)   -> collapse to Bact/Pro/Syn/Euk
#        - DOC / DON
#        - NOx
#        - DIC_pH only  (explicit)
#   2) Scales:
#        - ALL Nitrogen parts ×3   ( *_N , DON, NOx )
#        - DIC × scale_DIC_by  (optional, default 1.4 like before)
#   3) Assigns direction per Species×Component based on species-mean sign:
#        + => Uptake,  - => Release
#   4) For each Unique_code: draws 3 bars:
#        Uptake (stacked) | ΔO2 (single) | Release (stacked)
#   5) Saves one PNG per species.
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)

stopifnot(exists("raw_individual_tbl_num"))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 0) SETTINGS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
scale_N_by   <- 3
scale_DIC_by <- 1.4

species_3 <- c("Agelas oroides", "Chondrosia reniformis", "Dysidea avara")

out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

fill_cols <- c(
  "Bact" = "#F4A6A6",
  "Euk"  = "#A8D5BA",
  "Pro"  = "#9DBCE3",
  "Syn"  = "#F6C28B",
  "DOC"  = "#B9B9B9",
  "DON"  = "#8F8F8F",
  "DIC"  = "#C9B6E4",
  "NOx"  = "#6C91BF",
  "ΔO2"  = "#00BFC4"
)

# Bar order per Unique_code (like your global figure):
metric_levels <- c("Uptake", "ΔO2", "Release")

bar_titles <- c(
  "Uptake"  = "Ingested reduced\norganic matter",
  "ΔO2"     = "Oxygen uptake",
  "Release" = "Oxidized matter\nexhaled"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Start from ROW and standardize
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
row_tbl <- raw_individual_tbl_num %>%
  transmute(
    Unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    Species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),
    parameter   = str_trim(as.character(parameter)),
    IN          = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(IN)),
    EX          = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(EX)),
    Delta_raw   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != "",
    !is.na(Species), Species != "",
    is.finite(Delta_raw)
  )

message("Available species in ROW:")
print(sort(unique(row_tbl$Species)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Build component table per Unique_code (SIGNED Delta = IN-EX)
#    Components included in Uptake/Release stacks:
#      - FCM taxa C/N (collapse PEuk/NEuk/Euk -> Euk)
#      - DOC / DON
#      - NOx
#      - DIC (ONLY DIC_pH)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2A) FCM taxa (Bact/Pro/Syn/Euk/PEuk/NEuk)_(C|N)
fcm_comp <- row_tbl %>%
  filter(str_detect(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")) %>%
  mutate(
    Taxon_raw = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,2],
    CN        = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,3],
    Component = case_when(
      Taxon_raw %in% c("PEuk","NEuk","Euk") ~ "Euk",
      TRUE ~ Taxon_raw
    ),
    ElementGroup = if_else(CN == "N", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
    Delta_signed = Delta_raw
  ) %>%
  select(Species, Unique_code, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2B) DOC / DON
dom_comp <- row_tbl %>%
  filter(parameter %in% c("DOC","DON")) %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = parameter,
    ElementGroup = if_else(parameter == "DON", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
    Delta_signed = Delta_raw
  ) %>%
  select(Species, Unique_code, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2C) NOx
nox_comp <- row_tbl %>%
  filter(parameter == "NOx") %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = "NOx",
    ElementGroup = "Nitrogen",
    Delta_signed = Delta_raw
  ) %>%
  select(Species, Unique_code, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2D) DIC — ONLY DIC_pH (explicit)
dic_comp <- row_tbl %>%
  filter(parameter == "DIC_pH") %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code) %>%
  summarise(
    Delta_signed = mean(Delta_raw, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = "DIC",
    ElementGroup = "Carbon"
  ) %>%
  select(Species, Unique_code, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# Combine + collapse duplicates -> one numeric value per (Species, Unique_code, Component, ElementGroup)
comp_uc_all <- bind_rows(fcm_comp, dom_comp, nox_comp, dic_comp) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_signed)) %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code, Component, ElementGroup) %>%
  summarise(Delta_signed = sum(Delta_signed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    # Scaling rules (same as your global plot)
    Delta_scaled = case_when(
      ElementGroup == "Nitrogen" ~ Delta_signed * scale_N_by,
      Component == "DIC"         ~ Delta_signed * scale_DIC_by,
      TRUE                       ~ Delta_signed
    ),
    pattern_key = factor(if_else(ElementGroup == "Nitrogen", "stripe", "none"),
                         levels = c("none","stripe")),
    Component = factor(Component, levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx"))
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Assign direction per Species×Component (species-mean sign)
#    + => Uptake, - => Release
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
assign_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  group_by(Species, Component) %>%
  summarise(net_mean = mean(Delta_scaled, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(net_mean), net_mean != 0) %>%
  mutate(Dir = if_else(net_mean > 0, "Uptake", "Release")) %>%
  select(Species, Component, Dir)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Build stacks per Unique_code × Dir (MAGNITUDES)
#    contrib_mag is always positive and stacks within each bar.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
comp_uc_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  left_join(assign_dir, by = c("Species","Component")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Dir)) %>%
  mutate(
    contrib_mag = if_else(Dir == "Release", -Delta_scaled, Delta_scaled),
    contrib_mag = if_else(is.finite(contrib_mag) & contrib_mag > 0, contrib_mag, 0)
  )

# Stacked components (per code)
stack_uc_dir <- comp_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(Delta_umol_L = sum(contrib_mag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_umol_L), Delta_umol_L > 0) %>%
  transmute(
    Species,
    Unique_code,
    Metric = Dir,                 # Uptake / Release
    Taxon = Component,
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) ΔO2 per Unique_code (single bar)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
o2_tbl <- row_tbl %>%
  filter(parameter == "O2") %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code) %>%
  summarise(Delta_umol_L = mean(Delta_raw, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_umol_L)) %>%
  transmute(
    Species,
    Unique_code,
    Metric = "ΔO2",
    Taxon = factor("ΔO2", levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx","ΔO2")),
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key = factor("none", levels = c("none","stripe"))
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Plot function: ONE Species, 3 bars per Unique_code
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_species_plot_3bars <- function(sp_name) {

  df_S <- bind_rows(
    stack_uc_dir %>% filter(Species == sp_name),
    o2_tbl       %>% filter(Species == sp_name)
  )

  # Keep only codes that have all 3 bars present
  codes_ok <- df_S %>%
    distinct(Unique_code, Metric) %>%
    count(Unique_code) %>%
    filter(n == 3) %>%
    pull(Unique_code)

  df_S <- df_S %>% filter(Unique_code %in% codes_ok)

  if (nrow(df_S) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = paste("No complete codes for", sp_name)))
  }

  # Order Unique_code by ΔO2 (desc)
  code_order <- df_S %>%
    filter(Metric == "ΔO2") %>%
    group_by(Unique_code) %>%
    summarise(O2 = mean(Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(O2)) %>%
    pull(Unique_code)

  df_S <- df_S %>%
    mutate(
      Unique_code = factor(Unique_code, levels = code_order),
      Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_levels),
      Taxon  = factor(as.character(Taxon),
                      levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx","ΔO2")),
      pattern_key = factor(as.character(pattern_key), levels = c("none","stripe")),
      x_triplet = factor(
        paste(as.character(Unique_code), as.character(Metric), sep = "___"),
        levels = as.vector(t(outer(code_order, metric_levels,
                                  FUN = function(u, m) paste(u, m, sep = "___"))))
      )
    )

  # x labels: show bar-title always; show Unique_code only under the middle bar (ΔO2)
  x_lab_fun <- function(x) {
    parts <- strsplit(x, "___", fixed = TRUE)
    u <- sapply(parts, `[[`, 1)
    m <- sapply(parts, `[[`, 2)

    title <- unname(bar_titles[m])
    u2 <- u
    u2[m != "ΔO2"] <- ""

    paste0(title, "\n", u2)
  }

  ggplot(df_S, aes(x = x_triplet, y = Delta_umol_L, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +

    geom_col_pattern(
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.35,
      width = 0.90,
      pattern_colour  = "black",
      pattern_fill    = NA,
      pattern_angle   = 45,
      pattern_density = 0.10,
      pattern_spacing = 0.02,
      pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
    ) +

    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_pattern_manual(
      name = "Element",
      values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"),
      labels = c("Carbon", paste0("Nitrogen (scaled ×", scale_N_by, ")")),
      breaks = c("none","stripe")
    ) +

    scale_x_discrete(labels = x_lab_fun) +

    guides(
      fill = guide_legend(order = 1,
                          override.aes = list(pattern = "none", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.2)),
      pattern = guide_legend(order = 2,
                             override.aes = list(
                               fill = "white", colour = "black",
                               pattern = c("none","stripe"),
                               pattern_colour = "black",
                               pattern_density = 0.5,
                               pattern_spacing = 0.02,
                               pattern_angle = 45
                             ))
    ) +

    labs(
      title = bquote(italic(.(sp_name))),
      subtitle = paste0(
        "Per Unique_code: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release. ",
        "Uptake/Release are magnitudes after direction assignment by species-mean sign. ",
        "ΔO2 is signed (IN−EX). ",
        "DIC uses ONLY DIC_pH. N ×", scale_N_by, "; DIC ×", scale_DIC_by, "."
      ),
      x = NULL,
      y = expression(paste(Delta, " (", mu, "mol L"^{-1}, ")")),
      fill = "Component"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 7),
      legend.box.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Generate + save (3 species)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
for (sp in species_3) {

  if (!sp %in% row_tbl$Species) {
    message("SKIP (species not found): ", sp)
    next
  }

  p <- make_species_plot_3bars(sp)
  print(p)

  sp_file <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_\\-]", "_", sp)

  ggsave(
    filename = paste0("Energy_budget_", sp_file, "_3bars_perUnique_FROMROW.png"),
    plot = p,
    path = out_dir,
    width = 38,
    height = 18,
    units = "cm",
    dpi = 300
  )
}

################################################################################
# END
################################################################################

```


### ENERGY BUDGET — DELTA PANEL
```{r, fig.width=17, fig.height=13}

################################################################################
# ENERGY BUDGET — DELTA PANEL
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Build a two-panel figure based on DELTA values only:
#
#   Panel A = measured metabolic budget (no visual scaling)
#   Panel B = rescaled metabolic budget (visual scaling for display only)
#
# VISUAL STRUCTURE
# Each species is displayed as a triplet of bars:
#   Uptake | ΔO2 | Release
#
# MAIN LOGIC
# - Uses the RAW table directly
# - Direction (Uptake / Release) is assigned by the sign of the median
#   within species × component
# - Bar heights = median total magnitudes
# - Error bars = bootstrap 95% CI of the median
# - DIC uses ONLY DIC_pH
# - Two versions are produced:
#     1) unscaled display
#     2) scaled display (Nitrogen and DIC)
#
# IMPORTANT
# - This chunk uses DELTA ONLY
# - Flux figures are not redrawn here
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)
library(tibble)
library(readr)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

# ==============================================================================
# 0) FILE PATHS
# ==============================================================================
raw_file <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Summary_tables/All_3_species_recalc_flux_with_all_volumes/RAW_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"

summary_file <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Summary_tables/All_3_species_recalc_flux_with_all_volumes/SUMMARY_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"

stopifnot(file.exists(raw_file))
raw_tbl <- read_csv(raw_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

summary_tbl <- if (file.exists(summary_file)) {
  read_csv(summary_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  NULL
}

# ==============================================================================
# 1) SETTINGS
# ==============================================================================
# DELTA column to use
value_col_delta <- "Delta_recalc (µmol L^-1)"

# Visual scaling factors for the LOWER panel only
scale_N_by   <- 3
scale_DIC_by <- 1.4

# Bootstrap settings
boot_R    <- 10000
boot_seed <- 123

# Use NULL for automatic limits inside the function.
# A shared Y-axis will be defined later for both panels.
delta_y_lim <- NULL

# Output folder
out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Output file
out_file <- file.path(out_dir, "Delta_budget_two_panel.png")

# Component order in stacks and legend
component_levels <- c("Bact", "Euk", "Pro", "Syn", "DOC", "DON", "DIC", "NOx", "ΔO2")

# Fill colors
fill_cols <- c(
  "Bact" = "#F4A6A6",
  "Euk"  = "#A8D5BA",
  "Pro"  = "#9DBCE3",
  "Syn"  = "#F6C28B",
  "DOC"  = "#B9B9B9",
  "DON"  = "#8F8F8F",
  "DIC"  = "#C9B6E4",
  "NOx"  = "#6C91BF",
  "ΔO2"  = "#00BFC4"
)

# ==============================================================================
# 2) HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ==============================================================================

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bootstrap 95% CI of the median
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
median_ci_boot <- function(x, R = 10000, conf = 0.95, seed = 123) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)

  if (n == 0) {
    return(tibble(median = NA_real_, lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = 0L))
  }

  med <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)

  if (n == 1) {
    return(tibble(median = med, lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = 1L))
  }

  set.seed(seed)
  boot_stats <- replicate(
    R,
    median(sample(x, size = n, replace = TRUE), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  alpha <- (1 - conf) / 2
  ci <- quantile(
    boot_stats,
    probs = c(alpha, 1 - alpha),
    na.rm = TRUE,
    names = FALSE
  )

  tibble(
    median = med,
    lo = ci[1],
    hi = ci[2],
    n = n
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Visual scaling function
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This affects plotting magnitudes only, not direction assignment.
apply_visual_scaling <- function(component, element_group, x,
                                 scale_N_by = 1,
                                 scale_DIC_by = 1) {
  out <- x

  out[element_group == "Nitrogen"] <- out[element_group == "Nitrogen"] * scale_N_by
  out[component == "DIC"]          <- out[component == "DIC"] * scale_DIC_by

  out
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Main function to build ONE delta figure
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_delta_energy_budget_plot <- function(raw_tbl,
                                          value_col,
                                          scale_N_by = 1,
                                          scale_DIC_by = 1,
                                          boot_R = 10000,
                                          boot_seed = 123,
                                          component_levels,
                                          fill_cols,
                                          y_lim = NULL) {

  required_cols <- c("unique_code", "species", "parameter", value_col)
  stopifnot(all(required_cols %in% names(raw_tbl)))

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Basic cleaning
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  raw_tbl2 <- raw_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
      species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),
      parameter   = str_trim(as.character(parameter)),
      value_num   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[value_col]]))
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(unique_code), unique_code != "",
      !is.na(species), species != "",
      !is.na(parameter), parameter != ""
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Build components table
  # Included in Uptake / Release:
  # - Bact / Pro / Syn / Euk
  # - DOC / DON
  # - NOx
  # - DIC from DIC_pH only
  #
  # O2 is handled separately as the middle bar.
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  fcm_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
    filter(str_detect(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")) %>%
    mutate(
      Taxon_raw = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[, 2],
      CN        = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[, 3],
      Component = case_when(
        Taxon_raw %in% c("PEuk", "NEuk", "Euk") ~ "Euk",
        TRUE ~ Taxon_raw
      ),
      ElementGroup = if_else(CN == "N", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
      signed_value = value_num
    ) %>%
    select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, signed_value)

  dom_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
    filter(parameter %in% c("DOC", "DON")) %>%
    mutate(
      Component    = parameter,
      ElementGroup = if_else(parameter == "DON", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
      signed_value = value_num
    ) %>%
    select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, signed_value)

  nox_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
    filter(parameter == "NOx") %>%
    mutate(
      Component    = "NOx",
      ElementGroup = "Nitrogen",
      signed_value = value_num
    ) %>%
    select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, signed_value)

  dic_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
    filter(parameter == "DIC_pH") %>%
    group_by(unique_code, species) %>%
    summarise(
      signed_value = if (all(!is.finite(value_num))) NA_real_ else median(value_num, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Component    = "DIC",
      ElementGroup = "Carbon"
    ) %>%
    select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, signed_value)

  comp_uc_all <- bind_rows(fcm_comp, dom_comp, nox_comp, dic_comp) %>%
    filter(is.finite(signed_value)) %>%
    group_by(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup) %>%
    summarise(
      signed_value = sum(signed_value, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      pattern_key = factor(
        if_else(ElementGroup == "Nitrogen", "stripe", "none"),
        levels = c("none", "stripe")
      ),
      Component = factor(Component, levels = component_levels)
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Assign direction by median sign within species × component
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  assign_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
    group_by(species, Component) %>%
    summarise(
      net_median = median(signed_value, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_total    = n(),
      n_pos      = sum(signed_value > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_neg      = sum(signed_value < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(net_median), net_median != 0) %>%
    mutate(
      Dir = if_else(net_median > 0, "Uptake", "Release")
    )

  direction_qc <- assign_dir %>%
    arrange(species, Component)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Convert to positive magnitudes on the selected side
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  comp_uc_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
    left_join(assign_dir %>% select(species, Component, Dir),
              by = c("species", "Component")) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Dir)) %>%
    mutate(
      contrib_mag = if_else(Dir == "Release", -signed_value, signed_value),
      contrib_mag = if_else(is.finite(contrib_mag) & contrib_mag > 0, contrib_mag, 0)
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Apply display scaling
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  comp_uc_scaled <- comp_uc_dir %>%
    mutate(
      contrib_mag_scaled = apply_visual_scaling(
        component = as.character(Component),
        element_group = ElementGroup,
        x = contrib_mag,
        scale_N_by = scale_N_by,
        scale_DIC_by = scale_DIC_by
      )
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Totals per unique_code × species × Dir
  # These define the median bar height and the bootstrap CI
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  tot_uc_dir <- comp_uc_scaled %>%
    group_by(unique_code, species, Dir) %>%
    summarise(
      Total = sum(contrib_mag_scaled, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(Total), Total > 0)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Component shares within each unique_code bar
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  comp_uc_mag <- comp_uc_scaled %>%
    group_by(unique_code, species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
    summarise(
      comp_mag = sum(contrib_mag_scaled, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(comp_mag), comp_mag >= 0)

  comp_uc_prop <- comp_uc_mag %>%
    left_join(tot_uc_dir, by = c("unique_code", "species", "Dir")) %>%
    mutate(
      prop = if_else(is.finite(Total) & Total > 0, comp_mag / Total, NA_real_)
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(prop), prop >= 0)

  # Median total = bar height
  median_totals <- tot_uc_dir %>%
    group_by(species, Dir) %>%
    summarise(
      median_total = median(Total, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Median component proportion
  stack_prop_raw <- comp_uc_prop %>%
    group_by(species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
    summarise(
      median_prop = median(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(median_prop), median_prop > 0)

  # Renormalize so each stack sums exactly to median_total
  stack_prop_norm <- stack_prop_raw %>%
    group_by(species, Dir) %>%
    mutate(
      sum_median_prop = sum(median_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_norm = if_else(sum_median_prop > 0, median_prop / sum_median_prop, NA_real_)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  stack_species_dir <- stack_prop_norm %>%
    left_join(median_totals, by = c("species", "Dir")) %>%
    mutate(
      PlotValue = prop_norm * median_total
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(PlotValue), PlotValue > 0) %>%
    transmute(
      Species = species,
      Metric  = Dir,
      Taxon   = factor(as.character(Component), levels = component_levels),
      PlotValue,
      pattern_key
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Bootstrap CI for Uptake / Release
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  ci_dir <- tot_uc_dir %>%
    group_by(species, Dir) %>%
    summarise(
      median_ci_boot(Total, R = boot_R, seed = boot_seed),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      Species = species,
      Metric  = Dir,
      center  = median,
      lo,
      hi,
      n
    )

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # O2 middle bar
  # Plot absolute median ΔO2 to keep the same visual structure
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  o2_uc <- raw_tbl2 %>%
    filter(parameter == "O2") %>%
    group_by(unique_code, species) %>%
    summarise(
      O2_value = if (all(!is.finite(value_num))) NA_real_ else median(value_num, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(O2_value))

  o2_species <- o2_uc %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(
      PlotValue = abs(median(O2_value, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      Species = species,
      Metric  = "ΔO2",
      Taxon   = factor("ΔO2", levels = component_levels),
      PlotValue,
      pattern_key = factor("none", levels = c("none", "stripe"))
    )

  o2_ci <- o2_uc %>%
    group_by(species) %>%
    summarise(
      median_ci_boot(abs(O2_value), R = boot_R, seed = boot_seed),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      Species = species,
      Metric  = "ΔO2",
      center  = median,
      lo,
      hi,
      n
    )

  df_ci <- bind_rows(ci_dir, o2_ci)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Build plotting data
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  species_all <- sort(unique(raw_tbl2$species))

  df_plot <- bind_rows(stack_species_dir, o2_species) %>%
    mutate(
      Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
      Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake", "ΔO2", "Release")),
      Taxon   = factor(as.character(Taxon), levels = component_levels),
      x_triplet = factor(
        paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep = "___"),
        levels = as.vector(t(outer(
          species_all,
          c("Uptake", "ΔO2", "Release"),
          FUN = function(s, m) paste(s, m, sep = "___")
        )))
      )
    )

  df_ci <- df_ci %>%
    mutate(
      Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
      Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake", "ΔO2", "Release")),
      x_triplet = factor(
        paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep = "___"),
        levels = levels(df_plot$x_triplet)
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(x_triplet))

  separator_positions <- (1:(length(species_all) - 1)) * 3 + 0.5

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # X labels
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  bar_titles <- c(
    "Uptake"  = "Ingested reduced\norganic matter",
    "ΔO2"     = "Oxygen uptake",
    "Release" = "Oxidized matter\nexhaled"
  )

  x_lab_fun_titles <- function(x) {
    parts <- strsplit(x, "___", fixed = TRUE)
    m <- sapply(parts, `[[`, 2)
    unname(bar_titles[m])
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Plot
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  p <- ggplot(
    df_plot,
    aes(x = x_triplet, y = PlotValue, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = separator_positions, linewidth = 0.6, colour = "black") +

    geom_col_pattern(
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.35,
      width = 0.85,
      pattern_colour  = "black",
      pattern_fill    = "black",
      pattern_angle   = 45,
      pattern_density = 0.10,
      pattern_spacing = 0.02,
      pattern_key_scale_factor = 1.2
    ) +

    geom_errorbar(
      data = df_ci,
      aes(x = x_triplet, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      linewidth = 0.5,
      width = 0.18
    ) +

    scale_fill_manual(
      name = NULL,
      values = fill_cols,
      drop = FALSE
    ) +

    scale_pattern_manual(
      name   = NULL,
      values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"),
      labels = c("Carbon", "Nitrogen"),
      breaks = c("none", "stripe"),
      drop   = FALSE
    ) +

    scale_x_discrete(labels = x_lab_fun_titles) +

    scale_y_continuous(
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12)),
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7),
      minor_breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 14)
    ) +

    guides(
      fill = guide_legend(
        order = 1,
        override.aes = list(
          pattern = "none",
          colour = "black"
        )
      ),
      pattern = guide_legend(
        order = 2,
        override.aes = list(
          fill = c("white", "white"),
          pattern = c("none", "stripe"),
          pattern_fill = c("white", "black"),
          pattern_colour = c("black", "black"),
          pattern_density = c(0, 0.4),
          pattern_spacing = c(0.04, 0.04),
          pattern_angle = c(45, 45)
        )
      )
    ) +

    labs(
      title = NULL,
      subtitle = NULL,
      x = NULL,
      y = expression(paste("Median |", Delta, "| (", mu, "mol L"^{-1}, ")"))
    ) +

    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.4),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.2, "cm")
    )

  if (!is.null(y_lim)) {
    p <- p + coord_cartesian(ylim = y_lim)
  }

  list(
    plot = p,
    direction_qc = direction_qc,
    df_plot = df_plot,
    df_ci = df_ci
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# 3) TOP PANEL — UN SCALED DISPLAY
# ==============================================================================
res_delta_unscaled <- make_delta_energy_budget_plot(
  raw_tbl = raw_tbl,
  value_col = value_col_delta,
  scale_N_by = 1,
  scale_DIC_by = 1,
  boot_R = boot_R,
  boot_seed = boot_seed,
  component_levels = component_levels,
  fill_cols = fill_cols,
  y_lim = NULL
)

# ==============================================================================
# 4) BOTTOM PANEL — SCALED DISPLAY
# ==============================================================================
res_delta_scaled <- make_delta_energy_budget_plot(
  raw_tbl = raw_tbl,
  value_col = value_col_delta,
  scale_N_by = scale_N_by,
  scale_DIC_by = scale_DIC_by,
  boot_R = boot_R,
  boot_seed = boot_seed,
  component_levels = component_levels,
  fill_cols = fill_cols,
  y_lim = NULL
)

# ==============================================================================
# 5) SHARED Y-AXIS LIMIT FOR BOTH PANELS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This makes the unscaled and scaled panels directly comparable.
# ==============================================================================
shared_y_max <- max(
  c(
    res_delta_unscaled$df_plot$PlotValue,
    res_delta_unscaled$df_ci$hi,
    res_delta_scaled$df_plot$PlotValue,
    res_delta_scaled$df_ci$hi
  ),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

shared_y_lim <- c(0, shared_y_max * 1.12)

# ==============================================================================
# 6) BUILD PANEL A — MEASURED METABOLIC BUDGET
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Panel A:
# - no legend
# - species names above the middle bar
# - title above the panel (not inside the plotting area)
# ==============================================================================
p_delta_unscaled <- res_delta_unscaled$plot +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = shared_y_lim, clip = "off") +
  geom_text(
    data = res_delta_unscaled$df_plot %>%
      dplyr::filter(Metric == "ΔO2") %>%
      dplyr::distinct(Species, x_triplet) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(y = shared_y_lim[2] * 0.88),
    aes(x = x_triplet, y = y, label = Species),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "italic",
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "A. Measured metabolic budget",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    text = element_text(size = 17),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 17),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 0.5,
      vjust = 0.5,
      size = 15
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 17),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 17),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 16,
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 25, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10)
  )

# ==============================================================================
# 7) BUILD PANEL B — RESCALED METABOLIC BUDGET
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Panel B:
# - keeps the legend
# - legend appears below this panel only
# - title above the panel
# - extra top margin to separate it from panel A
# ==============================================================================
p_delta_scaled <- res_delta_scaled$plot +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = shared_y_lim, clip = "off") +
  geom_text(
    data = res_delta_scaled$df_plot %>%
      dplyr::filter(Metric == "ΔO2") %>%
      dplyr::distinct(Species, x_triplet) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(y = shared_y_lim[2] * 0.88),
    aes(x = x_triplet, y = y, label = Species),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "italic",
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "B. Rescaled metabolic budget: N x 3, C x 1.4",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.margin = margin(2, 6, 2, 6),
    text = element_text(size = 17),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 17),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 0.5,
      vjust = 0.5,
      size = 15
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 17),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 17),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 16,
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(b = 10)
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 35, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10)
  )

# ==============================================================================
# 8) COMBINE THE TWO PANELS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Important:
# We do NOT use "& theme(...)" here because that caused errors in your script.
# We also do NOT collect legends globally, because we want the legend only under
# panel B rather than as a global legend block.
# ==============================================================================
delta_panel_plot <- p_delta_unscaled / p_delta_scaled

# ==============================================================================
# 9) PRINT FINAL FIGURE
# ==============================================================================
print(delta_panel_plot)

# ==============================================================================
# 10) SAVE FINAL FIGURE
# ==============================================================================
ggsave(
  filename = out_file,
  plot = delta_panel_plot,
  width = 39,
  height = 25,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)

# ==============================================================================
# 11) OPTIONAL: SAVE QC TABLES
# ==============================================================================
write_csv(
  res_delta_unscaled$direction_qc,
  file.path(out_dir, "delta_direction_qc_unscaled.csv")
)

write_csv(
  res_delta_scaled$direction_qc,
  file.path(out_dir, "delta_direction_qc_scaled.csv")
)

################################################################################
# END
################################################################################
```


### ENERGY BUDGET — OVERALL MEANS (ALL SPECIES) + CI95 + Three bars per species: (Release/Uptake stacks) | ΔO2
```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
### ENERGY BUDGET — OVERALL MEANS (ALL SPECIES) + CI95
### Three bars per species (left→right): Uptake | ΔO2 | Release
### + Species names appear ABOVE the ΔO2 bar (middle), in italics
################################################################################
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)
library(tibble)

# ==============================================================================
# 0) INPUT — choose ROW numeric table
#    Expect columns: unique_code, species, parameter, Delta
# ==============================================================================
stopifnot(exists("raw_individual_tbl") || exists("raw_individual_tbl_num"))
raw_tbl <- if (exists("raw_individual_tbl_num")) raw_individual_tbl_num else raw_individual_tbl

raw_tbl2 <- raw_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),
    parameter   = str_trim(as.character(parameter)),
    Delta       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(unique_code), unique_code != "",
    !is.na(species), species != ""
  )

# ==============================================================================
# Helper: mean + 95% CI (t-based)
# ==============================================================================
ci95_tbl <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)
  if (n == 0) return(tibble(mean = NA_real_, lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = 0L))
  if (n < 2)  return(tibble(mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = n))
  m  <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  se <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n)
  tt <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1)
  tibble(mean = m, lo = m - tt * se, hi = m + tt * se, n = n)
}

# ==============================================================================
# 1) SETTINGS
# ==============================================================================
scale_N_by   <- 3
scale_DIC_by <- 1.4

# If you keep a hard y_lim, it can CUT the species names above the ΔO2 bars.
# Recommended: keep only lower bound at 0 and let the top expand automatically.
y_lim <- c(0, 25)   # set to NULL for fully automatic

fill_cols <- c(
  "Bact" = "#F4A6A6",
  "Euk"  = "#A8D5BA",
  "Pro"  = "#9DBCE3",
  "Syn"  = "#F6C28B",
  "DOC"  = "#B9B9B9",
  "DON"  = "#8F8F8F",
  "DIC"  = "#C9B6E4",
  "NOx"  = "#6C91BF",
  "ΔO2"  = "#00BFC4"
)

out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ==============================================================================
# 2) BUILD component table per unique_code (SIGNED Delta = IN-EX)
#    Components included in Uptake/Release bars:
#      - FCM taxa: Bact/Pro/Syn/Euk (+PEuk/NEuk collapsed into Euk) with C/N
#      - DOC / DON
#      - NOx
#      - DIC (ONLY DIC_pH)
# ==============================================================================
# 2A) FCM taxa C/N (accept PEuk/NEuk too, but collapse to Euk)
fcm_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(str_detect(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")) %>%
  mutate(
    Taxon_raw    = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,2],
    CN           = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,3],
    Component    = case_when(
      Taxon_raw %in% c("PEuk","NEuk","Euk") ~ "Euk",
      TRUE ~ Taxon_raw
    ),
    ElementGroup = if_else(CN == "N", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2B) DOC / DON
dom_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter %in% c("DOC","DON")) %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = parameter,
    ElementGroup = if_else(parameter == "DON", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2C) NOx
nox_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter == "NOx") %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = "NOx",
    ElementGroup = "Nitrogen",
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2D) DIC — ONLY DIC_pH (collapse duplicates safely)
dic_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter == "DIC_pH") %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species) %>%
  summarise(
    Delta_signed = if (all(!is.finite(Delta))) NA_real_ else mean(Delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = "DIC",
    ElementGroup = "Carbon"
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# Combine + collapse duplicates so each unique_code×component×element is numeric and unique
comp_uc_all <- bind_rows(fcm_comp, dom_comp, nox_comp, dic_comp) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_signed)) %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup) %>%
  summarise(Delta_signed = sum(Delta_signed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    # visual scaling
    Delta_scaled = case_when(
      ElementGroup == "Nitrogen" ~ Delta_signed * scale_N_by,
      Component == "DIC"         ~ Delta_signed * scale_DIC_by,
      TRUE                       ~ Delta_signed
    ),
    pattern_key = factor(if_else(ElementGroup == "Nitrogen", "stripe", "none"),
                         levels = c("none","stripe")),
    Component = factor(Component, levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx"))
  )




# ==============================================================================
# 3) Assign direction per Species×Component by species-mean SIGN of signed deltas
#    (positive = Uptake; negative = Release)
# ==============================================================================
assign_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  group_by(species, Component) %>%
  summarise(net_mean = mean(Delta_scaled, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(net_mean), net_mean != 0) %>%
  mutate(Dir = if_else(net_mean > 0, "Uptake", "Release")) %>%
  select(species, Component, Dir)

# ==============================================================================
# 4) FIXED stacks + CI:
#    - CI is computed on TOTALS per unique_code (correct population)
#    - Stacks are constructed to sum EXACTLY to mean(total) per species×Dir
#      by using mean(proportion)*mean(total)
# ==============================================================================
comp_uc_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  left_join(assign_dir, by = c("species","Component")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Dir)) %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert signed deltas to MAGNITUDE contribution for the chosen direction
    contrib_mag = if_else(Dir == "Release", -Delta_scaled, Delta_scaled),
    contrib_mag = if_else(is.finite(contrib_mag) & contrib_mag > 0, contrib_mag, 0)
  )

# Totals per unique_code × species × Dir  (this is the population for CI)
tot_uc_dir <- comp_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(Total = sum(contrib_mag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(Total), Total > 0)

# Component magnitudes per unique_code (for proportions)
comp_uc_mag <- comp_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(comp_mag = sum(contrib_mag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(comp_mag), comp_mag >= 0)

# Convert to within-unique_code proportions (sums to 1 within each bar)
comp_uc_prop <- comp_uc_mag %>%
  left_join(tot_uc_dir, by = c("unique_code","species","Dir")) %>%
  mutate(prop = if_else(is.finite(Total) & Total > 0, comp_mag / Total, NA_real_)) %>%
  filter(is.finite(prop), prop >= 0)

# Mean total per species×Dir (defines bar height)
mean_totals <- tot_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(mean_total = mean(Total, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Species mean stack that sums EXACTLY to mean_total
stack_species_dir <- comp_uc_prop %>%
  group_by(species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(mean_totals, by = c("species","Dir")) %>%
  mutate(Delta_umol_L = mean_prop * mean_total) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_umol_L), Delta_umol_L > 0) %>%
  transmute(
    Species = species,
    Metric  = Dir,          # Uptake / Release
    Taxon   = Component,
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key
  )

# CI95 from totals (matches the bar height population)
ci_dir <- tot_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(ci95_tbl(Total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Species = species, Metric = Dir, mean, lo, hi, n)

# ==============================================================================
# 5) ΔO2 (SIGNED, unchanged) + CI
# ==============================================================================
o2_uc <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter == "O2") %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species) %>%
  summarise(
    Delta_O2 = if (all(!is.finite(Delta))) NA_real_ else mean(Delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_O2))

o2_species <- o2_uc %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(Delta_umol_L = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(
    Species = species,
```
