```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
    Metric  = "ΔO2",
    Taxon   = "ΔO2",
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key = factor("none", levels = c("none","stripe"))
  )

o2_ci <- o2_uc %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(ci95_tbl(Delta_O2), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Species = species, Metric = "ΔO2", mean, lo, hi, n)

df_ci <- bind_rows(ci_dir, o2_ci)

# ==============================================================================
# 6) Build plotting DF (ORDERED bars per species: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release)
#    Release ends up on the RIGHT as requested.
# ==============================================================================
species_all <- sort(unique(raw_tbl2$species))

df_plot <- bind_rows(stack_species_dir, o2_species) %>%
  mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
    Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release")),
    Taxon   = factor(as.character(Taxon),
                     levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx","ΔO2")),
    x_triplet = factor(
      paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep = "___"),
      levels = as.vector(t(outer(species_all, c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release"),
                                FUN = function(s, m) paste(s, m, sep="___"))))
    )
  )

df_ci <- df_ci %>%
  mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
    Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release")),
    x_triplet = factor(
      paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep="___"),
      levels = levels(df_plot$x_triplet)
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_triplet))

# vertical separators between species groups (3 bars each)
separator_positions <- (1:(length(species_all) - 1)) * 3 + 0.5

# ==============================================================================
# 7) X-axis bar titles (long labels, angled)
# ==============================================================================
bar_titles <- c(
  "Uptake"  = "Ingested reduced\norganic matter",
  "ΔO2"     = "Oxygen uptake",
  "Release" = "Oxidized matter\nexhaled"
)

x_lab_fun_titles <- function(x) {
  parts <- strsplit(x, "___", fixed = TRUE)
  m <- sapply(parts, `[[`, 2)
  unname(bar_titles[m])
}

# ==============================================================================
# 8) Species names ABOVE the middle bar (ΔO2), italic
# ==============================================================================
bar_heights <- df_plot %>%
  group_by(Species, Metric, x_triplet) %>%
  summarise(bar_total = sum(Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Species labels — ALL at same vertical height (fixed level)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

# global maximum bar height
global_max_y <- max(df_plot$Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE)

# choose fixed height slightly above highest bar
label_height <- global_max_y * 1.4   # 15% above tallest bar

species_label_df <- df_plot %>%
  filter(Metric == "ΔO2") %>%
  distinct(Species, x_triplet) %>%
  mutate(y = label_height)
# ==============================================================================
# 9) PLOT
# ==============================================================================
p_3bars_dir_o2 <- ggplot(
  df_plot,
  aes(x = x_triplet, y = Delta_umol_L, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = separator_positions, linewidth = 0.6, colour = "black") +

  geom_col_pattern(
  color = "black",
  linewidth = 0.35,
  width = 0.85,
  pattern_colour  = "black",
  pattern_fill    = "black",
  pattern_angle   = 45,
  pattern_density = 0.10,
  pattern_spacing = 0.02,
  pattern_key_scale_factor = 1.2
) +
  
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_ci,
    aes(x = x_triplet, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    width = 0.18
  ) +

  # Species labels ABOVE ΔO2 bar (middle)
  geom_text(
    data = species_label_df,
    aes(x = x_triplet, y = y, label = Species),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "italic",
    size = 4
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +

  scale_pattern_manual(
  name   = "Element",
  values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"),
  labels = c("Carbon", "Nitrogen"),
  breaks = c("none", "stripe")
               ) +

  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_lab_fun_titles) +

  # extra top space so the species names do not get clipped
  scale_y_continuous(
  expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12)),
  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6),
  minor_breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 12)
) +

 guides(
  fill = guide_legend(
    order = 1,
    override.aes = list(
      pattern = "none",
      colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.2
    )
  ),
  pattern = guide_legend(
    order = 2,
    override.aes = list(
      fill = "white",
      colour = "black",
      pattern = c("none", "stripe"),
      pattern_colour = "black",
      pattern_density = 0.5,
      pattern_spacing = 0.02,
      pattern_angle = 45
    )
  )
) +

  labs(
    title = "Per species: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Uptake/Release: direction assigned by species-mean sign of signed (IN−EX) deltas, plotted as magnitudes. ",
      "ΔO2 remains signed (IN−EX). ",
      "Error bars = 95% CI of bar totals across Unique_code. ",
      "DIC uses ONLY DIC_pH. N scaled ×", scale_N_by, "; DIC scaled ×", scale_DIC_by, "."
    ),
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(paste("|", Delta, "| (", mu, "mol L"^{-1}, ")")),
    fill = "Component"
  ) +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6),
    # long x labels -> tilt slightly
    axis.text.x = element_text(
  angle = 0,
  hjust = 0.5,
  vjust = 0.5,
  size = 14
)
  )

# Optional: control y-limits (recommended: only force lower bound 0)
if (!is.null(y_lim)) p_3bars_dir_o2 <- p_3bars_dir_o2 + coord_cartesian(ylim = y_lim)

print(p_3bars_dir_o2)

# ==============================================================================
# 10) SAVE
# ==============================================================================
ggsave(
  filename = out_file,
  plot = p_3bars_dir_o2,
  width = 40, height = 16, units = "cm", dpi = 300
)

file.exists(out_file)
file.info(out_file)
################################################################################
# END
################################################################################
```

### ENERGY BUDGET (NO SCALING) — PER SPECIES: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release  + CI95
```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
################################################################################
### ENERGY BUDGET (NO SCALING) — PER SPECIES: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release  + CI95
### ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
### PURPOSE
###   Plot 3 bars per species (left→right):
###     1) Uptake  : magnitude of components whose mean signed Δ(IN−EX) > 0
###     2) ΔO2     : signed oxygen delta (IN−EX), shown as a single bar
###     3) Release : magnitude of components whose mean signed Δ(IN−EX) < 0
###
### IMPORTANT (THIS VERSION = NO SCALING)
###   - No ×3 on Nitrogen
###   - No ×1.4 on DIC
###   - Values come directly from raw_individual_tbl_num (or raw_individual_tbl)
###   - DIC uses ONLY DIC_pH
###
### NOTES
###   - Uptake/Release direction is assigned by species-mean SIGN (per component).
###   - Bars are magnitudes (absolute contributions), so Uptake/Release are positive.
###   - Error bars: 95% CI of TOTAL bar heights across unique_code.
###   - Nitrogen is still shown with stripes (visual cue only, NOT scaling).
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)
library(tibble)

# ==============================================================================
# 0) INPUT — choose ROW numeric table
#    Expect columns at least: unique_code, species, parameter, Delta
# ==============================================================================
stopifnot(exists("raw_individual_tbl") || exists("raw_individual_tbl_num"))
raw_tbl <- if (exists("raw_individual_tbl_num")) raw_individual_tbl_num else raw_individual_tbl

raw_tbl2 <- raw_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),
    parameter   = str_trim(as.character(parameter)),
    Delta       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(unique_code), unique_code != "",
    !is.na(species), species != ""
  )

# ==============================================================================
# Helper: mean + 95% CI (t-based)
# ==============================================================================
ci95_tbl <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)
  if (n == 0) return(tibble(mean = NA_real_, lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = 0L))
  if (n < 2)  return(tibble(mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = n))
  m  <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  se <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n)
  tt <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1)
  tibble(mean = m, lo = m - tt * se, hi = m + tt * se, n = n)
}

# ==============================================================================
# 1) SETTINGS (NO SCALING)
# ==============================================================================
scale_N_by   <- 1
scale_DIC_by <- 1

# y-limit: keep lower bound at 0; let the top be automatic (recommended).
# If you force an upper bound, labels can be clipped.
y_lim <- c(0, NA)   # set to NULL for fully automatic
# y_lim <- c(0, 20) # use only if you really want a fixed cap

fill_cols <- c(
  "Bact" = "#F4A6A6",
  "Euk"  = "#A8D5BA",
  "Pro"  = "#9DBCE3",
  "Syn"  = "#F6C28B",
  "DOC"  = "#B9B9B9",
  "DON"  = "#8F8F8F",
  "DIC"  = "#C9B6E4",
  "NOx"  = "#6C91BF",
  "ΔO2"  = "#00BFC4"
)

out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# IMPORTANT: new filename so it won't overwrite your scaled version
fig_name <- "EnergyBudget_3bars_perSpecies_FROMROW_NOscaling_DICpH.png"

# ==============================================================================
# 2) BUILD component table per unique_code (SIGNED Delta = IN−EX)
#    Components included in Uptake/Release bars:
#      - FCM taxa: Bact/Pro/Syn/Euk (+PEuk/NEuk collapsed into Euk) with C/N
#      - DOC / DON
#      - NOx
#      - DIC (ONLY DIC_pH)
# ==============================================================================
# 2A) FCM taxa C/N (accept PEuk/NEuk too, but collapse to Euk)
fcm_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(str_detect(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")) %>%
  mutate(
    Taxon_raw    = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,2],
    CN           = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,3],
    Component    = case_when(
      Taxon_raw %in% c("PEuk","NEuk","Euk") ~ "Euk",
      TRUE ~ Taxon_raw
    ),
    ElementGroup = if_else(CN == "N", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2B) DOC / DON
dom_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter %in% c("DOC","DON")) %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = parameter,
    ElementGroup = if_else(parameter == "DON", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2C) NOx
nox_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter == "NOx") %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = "NOx",
    ElementGroup = "Nitrogen",
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 2D) DIC — ONLY DIC_pH (collapse duplicates safely)
dic_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter == "DIC_pH") %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species) %>%
  summarise(
    Delta_signed = if (all(!is.finite(Delta))) NA_real_ else mean(Delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Component    = "DIC",
    ElementGroup = "Carbon"
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# Combine + collapse duplicates so each unique_code×component×element is unique numeric
comp_uc_all <- bind_rows(fcm_comp, dom_comp, nox_comp, dic_comp) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_signed)) %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup) %>%
  summarise(Delta_signed = sum(Delta_signed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    # NO SCALING (scale multipliers are 1 here)
    Delta_scaled = case_when(
      ElementGroup == "Nitrogen" ~ Delta_signed * scale_N_by,
      Component == "DIC"         ~ Delta_signed * scale_DIC_by,
      TRUE                       ~ Delta_signed
    ),
    pattern_key = factor(if_else(ElementGroup == "Nitrogen", "stripe", "none"),
                         levels = c("none","stripe")),
    Component = factor(Component, levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx"))
  )

# QC: prove nothing was scaled (max diff must be 0 when scale_* = 1)
qc_scaling <- comp_uc_all %>%
  summarise(
    max_abs_diff = max(abs(Delta_scaled - Delta_signed), na.rm = TRUE),
    any_diff     = any(abs(Delta_scaled - Delta_signed) > 1e-12, na.rm = TRUE),
    scale_N_by   = unique(scale_N_by),
    scale_DIC_by = unique(scale_DIC_by)
  )
print(qc_scaling)

# ==============================================================================
# 3) Assign direction per Species×Component by species-mean SIGN of signed deltas
#    (positive = Uptake; negative = Release)
# ==============================================================================
assign_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  group_by(species, Component) %>%
  summarise(net_mean = mean(Delta_scaled, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(net_mean), net_mean != 0) %>%
  mutate(Dir = if_else(net_mean > 0, "Uptake", "Release")) %>%
  select(species, Component, Dir)

# ==============================================================================
# 4) FIXED stacks + CI:
#    - CI is computed on TOTALS per unique_code (correct population)
#    - Stacks sum EXACTLY to mean(total) per species×Dir using mean(prop)*mean(total)
# ==============================================================================
comp_uc_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  left_join(assign_dir, by = c("species","Component")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Dir)) %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert signed deltas to MAGNITUDE contribution for the chosen direction
    contrib_mag = if_else(Dir == "Release", -Delta_scaled, Delta_scaled),
    contrib_mag = if_else(is.finite(contrib_mag) & contrib_mag > 0, contrib_mag, 0)
  )

# Totals per unique_code × species × Dir  (population for CI)
tot_uc_dir <- comp_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(Total = sum(contrib_mag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(Total), Total > 0)

# Component magnitudes per unique_code (for proportions)
comp_uc_mag <- comp_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(comp_mag = sum(contrib_mag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(comp_mag), comp_mag >= 0)

# Within-unique_code proportions (sum to 1 within each bar)
comp_uc_prop <- comp_uc_mag %>%
  left_join(tot_uc_dir, by = c("unique_code","species","Dir")) %>%
  mutate(prop = if_else(is.finite(Total) & Total > 0, comp_mag / Total, NA_real_)) %>%
  filter(is.finite(prop), prop >= 0)

# Mean total per species×Dir (defines bar height)
mean_totals <- tot_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(mean_total = mean(Total, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Species mean stack that sums EXACTLY to mean_total
stack_species_dir <- comp_uc_prop %>%
  group_by(species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(mean_totals, by = c("species","Dir")) %>%
  mutate(Delta_umol_L = mean_prop * mean_total) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_umol_L), Delta_umol_L > 0) %>%
  transmute(
    Species = species,
    Metric  = Dir,          # Uptake / Release
    Taxon   = Component,
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key
  )

# CI95 from totals
ci_dir <- tot_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(ci95_tbl(Total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Species = species, Metric = Dir, mean, lo, hi, n)

# ==============================================================================
# 5) ΔO2 (SIGNED, unchanged) + CI
# ==============================================================================
o2_uc <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter == "O2") %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species) %>%
  summarise(
    Delta_O2 = if (all(!is.finite(Delta))) NA_real_ else mean(Delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_O2))

o2_species <- o2_uc %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(Delta_umol_L = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(
    Species = species,
    Metric  = "ΔO2",
    Taxon   = "ΔO2",
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key = factor("none", levels = c("none","stripe"))
  )

o2_ci <- o2_uc %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(ci95_tbl(Delta_O2), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Species = species, Metric = "ΔO2", mean, lo, hi, n)

df_ci <- bind_rows(ci_dir, o2_ci)

# ==============================================================================
# 6) Build plotting DF (ORDERED bars per species: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release)
# ==============================================================================
species_all <- sort(unique(raw_tbl2$species))

df_plot <- bind_rows(stack_species_dir, o2_species) %>%
  mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
    Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release")),
    Taxon   = factor(as.character(Taxon),
                     levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx","ΔO2")),
    x_triplet = factor(
      paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep = "___"),
      levels = as.vector(t(outer(species_all, c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release"),
                                FUN = function(s, m) paste(s, m, sep="___"))))
    )
  )

df_ci <- df_ci %>%
  mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
    Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release")),
    x_triplet = factor(
      paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep="___"),
      levels = levels(df_plot$x_triplet)
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_triplet))

# vertical separators between species groups (3 bars each)
separator_positions <- (1:(length(species_all) - 1)) * 3 + 0.5

# ==============================================================================
# 7) X-axis bar titles (long labels, angled)
# ==============================================================================
bar_titles <- c(
  "Uptake"  = "Ingested reduced\norganic matter",
  "ΔO2"     = "Oxygen uptake",
  "Release" = "Oxidized matter\nexhaled"
)

x_lab_fun_titles <- function(x) {
  parts <- strsplit(x, "___", fixed = TRUE)
  m <- sapply(parts, `[[`, 2)
  unname(bar_titles[m])
}

# ==============================================================================
# 8) Species names ABOVE the middle bar (ΔO2), italic
# ==============================================================================
global_max_y  <- max(df_plot$Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE)
label_height  <- global_max_y * 1.3   # truly 15% above tallest bar

species_label_df <- df_plot %>%
  filter(Metric == "ΔO2") %>%
  distinct(Species, x_triplet) %>%
  mutate(y = label_height)

# ==============================================================================
# 9) PLOT
# ==============================================================================
p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING <- ggplot(
  df_plot,
  aes(x = x_triplet, y = Delta_umol_L, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = separator_positions, linewidth = 0.6, colour = "black") +

  geom_col_pattern(
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.35,
    width = 0.85,
    pattern_colour  = "black",
    pattern_fill    = NA,
    pattern_angle   = 45,
    pattern_density = 0.10,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02
  ) +

  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_ci,
    aes(x = x_triplet, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    width = 0.18
  ) +

  geom_text(
    data = species_label_df,
    aes(x = x_triplet, y = y, label = Species),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "italic",
    size = 4
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +

  # Stripes = Nitrogen (visual only; NO scaling here)
  scale_pattern_manual(
    name   = "Element",
    values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"),
    labels = c("Carbon", "Nitrogen"),
    breaks = c("none","stripe")
  ) +

  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_lab_fun_titles) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +

  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      order = 1,
      override.aes = list(pattern = "none", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.2)
    ),
    pattern = guide_legend(
      order = 2,
      override.aes = list(
        fill = "white",
        colour = "black",
        pattern = c("none","stripe"),
        pattern_colour = "black",
        pattern_density = 0.5,
        pattern_spacing = 0.02,
        pattern_angle = 45
      )
    )
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Per species: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release",
    subtitle = "Uptake/Release by species-mean sign of signed (IN−EX) deltas (magnitudes). ΔO2 remains signed (IN−EX). Error bars = 95% CI of bar totals across Unique_code. DIC uses ONLY DIC_pH.",
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(paste("|", Delta, "| (", mu, "mol L"^{-1}, ")")),
    fill = "Component"
  ) +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
  )

# Optional: control y-limits
if (!is.null(y_lim)) p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING <- p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING + coord_cartesian(ylim = y_lim)

print(p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING)

# ==============================================================================
# 10) SAVE (NEW NAME)
# ==============================================================================
ggsave(
  filename = fig_name,
  plot     = p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING,
  path     = out_dir,
  width    = 40, height = 16, units = "cm", dpi = 300
)

################################################################################
# END
################################################################################
```


### ENERGY BUDGET DYNAMIC SCENARIO SELECTOR (NO SCALING) 
```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
################################################################################
# ENERGY BUDGET (NO SCALING) — PER SPECIES: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release  + CI95
# Source: sponge_db2_with_cn (chem) + fcm_scenarios (FCM scenario)
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)
library(tibble)

stopifnot(exists("sponge_db2_with_cn"), exists("fcm_scenarios"))

# ==============================================================================
# 0) SETTINGS — פה את שולטת בהכל בקלות
# ==============================================================================
scenario_keep <- "S6_NEuk_allometric_C + Redfield_N"  # FCM scenario
stopifnot(scenario_keep %in% unique(fcm_scenarios$Scenario))

# DIC source: "pH" or "dicex"
dic_source <- "pH"

# include/exclude components quickly
keep_components <- c("Bact","Pro","Syn","Euk","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx")  # what enters Uptake/Release stacks
# keep_components <- c("Bact","Pro","Syn","Euk","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx","NH4","PO4") # example

# NO scaling in this figure
scale_N_by   <- 1
scale_DIC_by <- 1

# y-limit (optional)
y_lim <- c(0, NA)  # or NULL for fully automatic

fill_cols <- c(
  "Bact" = "#F4A6A6",
  "Euk"  = "#A8D5BA",
  "Pro"  = "#9DBCE3",
  "Syn"  = "#F6C28B",
  "DOC"  = "#B9B9B9",
  "DON"  = "#8F8F8F",
  "DIC"  = "#C9B6E4",
  "NOx"  = "#6C91BF",
  "NH4"  = "#5AA6A6",
  "PO4"  = "#B67FB6",
  "ΔO2"  = "#00BFC4"
)

# ==============================================================================
# Helper: mean + 95% CI (t-based)
# ==============================================================================
ci95_tbl <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)
  if (n == 0) return(tibble(mean = NA_real_, lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = 0L))
  if (n < 2)  return(tibble(mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = n))
  m  <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  se <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n)
  tt <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1)
  tibble(mean = m, lo = m - tt * se, hi = m + tt * se, n = n)
}

get_num <- function(df, nm) if (nm %in% names(df)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[nm]])) else rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))

# ==============================================================================
# 1) BASE IDs + Q
# ==============================================================================
base_tbl <- sponge_db2_with_cn %>%
  transmute(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),
    Q_L_hr      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ofr_l_hr_1))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(unique_code), unique_code != "", !is.na(species), species != "") %>%
  distinct(unique_code, species, .keep_all = TRUE)

# ==============================================================================
# 2) CHEMISTRY: build a clean long table of IN/EX then Delta = IN-EX
#    (controlled DIC choice!)
# ==============================================================================
chem_direct <- sponge_db2_with_cn %>%
  transmute(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),

    O2_IN  = get_num(., "oxy_in_mean_oxygen_conc_umol_l"),
    O2_EX  = get_num(., "oxy_ex_mean_oxygen_conc_umol_l"),

    # DIC candidates
    DIC_pH_IN    = get_num(., "ph_in_mean_dic_conc_umol_l"),
    DIC_pH_EX    = get_num(., "ph_ex_mean_dic_conc_umol_l"),
    DIC_dicex_IN = get_num(., "dic_ex_in_mean_dic_conc_umol_l"),
    DIC_dicex_EX = get_num(., "dic_ex_ex_mean_dic_conc_umol_l"),

    NOx_IN = coalesce(get_num(., "ex_in_nox_conc_umol_l"), get_num(., "ex_in_nox_conc_mol_l")),
    NOx_EX = coalesce(get_num(., "ex_ex_nox_conc_umol_l"), get_num(., "ex_ex_nox_conc_mol_l")),

    NH4_IN = coalesce(get_num(., "ex_in_nh_conc_umol_l"),  get_num(., "ex_in_nh_conc_mol_l")),
    NH4_EX = coalesce(get_num(., "ex_ex_nh_conc_umol_l"),  get_num(., "ex_ex_nh_conc_mol_l")),

    PO4_IN = coalesce(get_num(., "ex_in_po_conc_umol_l"),  get_num(., "ex_in_po_conc_mol_l")),
    PO4_EX = coalesce(get_num(., "ex_ex_po_conc_umol_l"),  get_num(., "ex_ex_po_conc_mol_l")),

    DOC_IN = get_num(., "dom_ex_in_doc_conc_umol_l"),
    DOC_EX = get_num(., "dom_ex_ex_doc_conc_umol_l"),

    TN_IN  = get_num(., "dom_ex_in_tn_conc_umol_l"),
    TN_EX  = get_num(., "dom_ex_ex_tn_conc_umol_l")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(unique_code), unique_code != "", !is.na(species), species != "") %>%
  mutate(
    DIN_IN = ifelse(is.na(NOx_IN) & is.na(NH4_IN), NA_real_, coalesce(NOx_IN, 0) + coalesce(NH4_IN, 0)),
    DIN_EX = ifelse(is.na(NOx_EX) & is.na(NH4_EX), NA_real_, coalesce(NOx_EX, 0) + coalesce(NH4_EX, 0)),
    DON_IN = ifelse(!is.na(TN_IN) & !is.na(DIN_IN), TN_IN - DIN_IN, NA_real_),
    DON_EX = ifelse(!is.na(TN_EX) & !is.na(DIN_EX), TN_EX - DIN_EX, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # choose DIC columns based on dic_source
    DIC_IN = if (dic_source == "pH") DIC_pH_IN else DIC_dicex_IN,
    DIC_EX = if (dic_source == "pH") DIC_pH_EX else DIC_dicex_EX
  )

chem_long <- chem_direct %>%
  select(
    unique_code, species,
    O2_IN, O2_EX,
    DIC_IN, DIC_EX,
    NOx_IN, NOx_EX,
    NH4_IN, NH4_EX,
    PO4_IN, PO4_EX,
    DOC_IN, DOC_EX,
    DON_IN, DON_EX
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(unique_code, species), names_to = "name", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    side = ifelse(str_detect(name, "_IN$"), "IN", "EX"),
    parameter = str_remove(name, "_(IN|EX)$")
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, parameter, side, value) %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, parameter, side) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = side, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(Delta = IN - EX) %>%
  mutate(
    parameter = recode(parameter,
                       "O2"  = "O2",
                       "DIC" = "DIC",
                       "NOx" = "NOx",
                       "NH4" = "NH4",
                       "PO4" = "PO4",
                       "DOC" = "DOC",
                       "DON" = "DON")
  )

# ==============================================================================
# 3) FCM scenario: Taxon C/N -> build Bact_C etc with Delta = IN-EX
# ==============================================================================
species_map <- base_tbl %>% distinct(unique_code, species)

fcm_long <- fcm_scenarios %>%
  filter(Scenario == scenario_keep) %>%
  transmute(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(Unique_code)),
    InEx        = toupper(str_trim(as.character(InEx))),
    Taxon       = as.character(Taxon),
    Element     = as.character(Element),
    value       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(umol_L))
  ) %>%
  filter(InEx %in% c("IN","EX"),
         Element %in% c("Carbon","Nitrogen"),
         !is.na(unique_code), unique_code != "") %>%
  mutate(
    parameter = paste0(Taxon, "_", ifelse(Element == "Carbon", "C", "N"))
  ) %>%
  left_join(species_map, by = "unique_code") %>%
  filter(!is.na(species)) %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, parameter, InEx) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = InEx, values_from = value, values_fill = NA_real_) %>%
  mutate(
    IN = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(IN)),
    EX = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(EX)),
    Delta = IN - EX
  )

# ==============================================================================
# 4) Unified numeric table that replaces raw_individual_tbl_num (inside this chunk)
# ==============================================================================
raw_tbl2 <- bind_rows(
  chem_long %>% select(unique_code, species, parameter, IN, EX, Delta),
  fcm_long  %>% select(unique_code, species, parameter, IN, EX, Delta)
) %>%
  left_join(base_tbl %>% select(unique_code, species, Q_L_hr), by = c("unique_code","species")) %>%
  mutate(
    unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),
    parameter   = str_trim(as.character(parameter)),
    Delta       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(unique_code), unique_code != "", !is.na(species), species != "") 

# ==============================================================================
# 5) Build component table (SIGNED Delta = IN-EX) for energy stacks
# ==============================================================================
# 5A) FCM taxa C/N -> collapse PEuk/NEuk to Euk
fcm_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(str_detect(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")) %>%
  mutate(
    Taxon_raw    = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,2],
    CN           = str_match(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")[,3],
    Component    = case_when(
      Taxon_raw %in% c("PEuk","NEuk","Euk") ~ "Euk",
      TRUE ~ Taxon_raw
    ),
    ElementGroup = if_else(CN == "N", "Nitrogen", "Carbon"),
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

# 5B) chemistry components (DOC/DON/NOx/DIC/NH4/PO4)
chem_comp <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter %in% c("DOC","DON","NOx","DIC","NH4","PO4")) %>%
  mutate(
    Component = parameter,
    ElementGroup = case_when(
      parameter %in% c("DON","NOx","NH4") ~ "Nitrogen",
      TRUE ~ "Carbon"
    ),
    Delta_signed = Delta
  ) %>%
  select(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup, Delta_signed)

comp_uc_all <- bind_rows(fcm_comp, chem_comp) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_signed)) %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Component, ElementGroup) %>%
  summarise(Delta_signed = sum(Delta_signed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    Delta_scaled = case_when(
      ElementGroup == "Nitrogen" ~ Delta_signed * scale_N_by,
      Component == "DIC"         ~ Delta_signed * scale_DIC_by,
      TRUE                       ~ Delta_signed
    ),
    pattern_key = factor(if_else(ElementGroup == "Nitrogen", "stripe", "none"),
                         levels = c("none","stripe")),
    Component = as.character(Component)
  ) %>%
  filter(Component %in% keep_components)

# ==============================================================================
# 6) Assign direction (Uptake vs Release) by species-mean SIGN per Component
# ==============================================================================
assign_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  group_by(species, Component) %>%
  summarise(net_mean = mean(Delta_scaled, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(net_mean), net_mean != 0) %>%
  mutate(Dir = if_else(net_mean > 0, "Uptake", "Release")) %>%
  select(species, Component, Dir)

comp_uc_dir <- comp_uc_all %>%
  left_join(assign_dir, by = c("species","Component")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Dir)) %>%
  mutate(
    contrib_mag = if_else(Dir == "Release", -Delta_scaled, Delta_scaled),
    contrib_mag = if_else(is.finite(contrib_mag) & contrib_mag > 0, contrib_mag, 0)
  )

# Totals per unique_code × species × Dir (for CI)
tot_uc_dir <- comp_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(Total = sum(contrib_mag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(Total), Total > 0)

# Proportions within each unique_code bar
comp_uc_prop <- comp_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(comp_mag = sum(contrib_mag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(tot_uc_dir, by = c("unique_code","species","Dir")) %>%
  mutate(prop = if_else(is.finite(Total) & Total > 0, comp_mag / Total, NA_real_)) %>%
  filter(is.finite(prop), prop >= 0)

mean_totals <- tot_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(mean_total = mean(Total, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

stack_species_dir <- comp_uc_prop %>%
  group_by(species, Dir, Component, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(mean_totals, by = c("species","Dir")) %>%
  mutate(Delta_umol_L = mean_prop * mean_total) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_umol_L), Delta_umol_L > 0) %>%
  transmute(
    Species = species,
    Metric  = Dir,
    Taxon   = Component,
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key
  )

ci_dir <- tot_uc_dir %>%
  group_by(species, Dir) %>%
  summarise(ci95_tbl(Total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Species = species, Metric = Dir, mean, lo, hi, n)

# ==============================================================================
# 7) ΔO2 (SIGNED) + CI
# ==============================================================================
o2_uc <- raw_tbl2 %>%
  filter(parameter == "O2") %>%
  group_by(unique_code, species) %>%
  summarise(Delta_O2 = mean(Delta, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(Delta_O2))

o2_species <- o2_uc %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(Delta_umol_L = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(
    Species = species,
    Metric  = "ΔO2",
    Taxon   = "ΔO2",
    Delta_umol_L,
    pattern_key = factor("none", levels = c("none","stripe"))
  )

o2_ci <- o2_uc %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(ci95_tbl(Delta_O2), .groups = "drop") %>%
  transmute(Species = species, Metric = "ΔO2", mean, lo, hi, n)

df_ci <- bind_rows(ci_dir, o2_ci)

# ==============================================================================
# 8) Build plot DF (ORDER: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release)
# ==============================================================================
species_all <- sort(unique(raw_tbl2$species))

df_plot <- bind_rows(stack_species_dir, o2_species) %>%
  mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
    Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release")),
    Taxon   = factor(as.character(Taxon),
                     levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON","DIC","NOx","NH4","PO4","ΔO2")),
    x_triplet = factor(
      paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep = "___"),
      levels = as.vector(t(outer(species_all, c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release"),
                                FUN = function(s, m) paste(s, m, sep="___"))))
    )
  )

df_ci <- df_ci %>%
  mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = species_all),
    Metric  = factor(Metric, levels = c("Uptake","ΔO2","Release")),
    x_triplet = factor(
      paste(as.character(Species), as.character(Metric), sep="___"),
      levels = levels(df_plot$x_triplet)
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_triplet))

separator_positions <- (1:(length(species_all) - 1)) * 3 + 0.5

bar_titles <- c(
  "Uptake"  = "Ingested reduced\norganic matter",
  "ΔO2"     = "Oxygen uptake",
  "Release" = "Oxidized matter\nexhaled"
)
x_lab_fun_titles <- function(x) {
  parts <- strsplit(x, "___", fixed = TRUE)
  m <- sapply(parts, `[[`, 2)
  unname(bar_titles[m])
}

global_max_y <- max(df_plot$Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE)
label_height <- global_max_y * 1.3
species_label_df <- df_plot %>%
  filter(Metric == "ΔO2") %>%
  distinct(Species, x_triplet) %>%
  mutate(y = label_height)

# ==============================================================================
# 9) PLOT
# ==============================================================================
p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING <- ggplot(
  df_plot,
  aes(x = x_triplet, y = Delta_umol_L, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = separator_positions, linewidth = 0.6, colour = "black") +
  geom_col_pattern(
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.35,
    width = 0.85,
    pattern_colour  = "black",
    pattern_fill    = NA,
    pattern_angle   = 45,
    pattern_density = 0.10,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_ci,
    aes(x = x_triplet, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    width = 0.18
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = species_label_df,
    aes(x = x_triplet, y = y, label = Species),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "italic",
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    name   = "Element",
    values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"),
    labels = c("Carbon", "Nitrogen"),
    breaks = c("none","stripe")
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_lab_fun_titles) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      order = 1,
      override.aes = list(pattern = "none", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.2)
    ),
    pattern = guide_legend(
      order = 2,
      override.aes = list(
        fill = "white",
        colour = "black",
        pattern = c("none","stripe"),
        pattern_colour = "black",
        pattern_density = 0.5,
        pattern_spacing = 0.02,
        pattern_angle = 45
      )
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Per species: Uptake | ΔO2 | Release",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Source: sponge_db2_with_cn + fcm_scenarios (", scenario_keep, "). ",
      "Uptake/Release by species-mean sign of signed (IN−EX) deltas (magnitudes). ",
      "ΔO2 remains signed (IN−EX). Error bars = 95% CI of bar totals across Unique_code. ",
      "DIC source = ", dic_source, "."
    ),
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(paste("|", Delta, "| (", mu, "mol L"^{-1}, ")")),
    fill = "Component"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
  )

if (!is.null(y_lim)) p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING <- p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING + coord_cartesian(ylim = y_lim)

print(p_3bars_dir_o2_NOSCALING)

################################################################################
# END
################################################################################
```

### ENERGY BUDGET FIGURE (CLEAN + ROBUST + LEGEND FIX)

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}


################################################################################
# ENERGY BUDGET FIGURE (CLEAN + ROBUST + LEGEND FIX)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# WHAT YOU GET (final output):
#   • 3 panels (one per Species) arranged in 1 row
#   • Main plot in each panel:
#       - Boxplot of Total Energy (Δ IN−EX; per Unique_code)
#       - Boxplot of ΔO2 (Δ IN−EX; per Unique_code)
#   • In each panel: an INSET that "comes out" of the Total Energy box
#       - Inset = stacked bar (species-mean breakdown of Total Energy)
#       - Colors = Taxon (Bact/Pro/Syn/Euk/DOC/DON)
#       - Pattern = Element group (Carbon solid, Nitrogen striped)
#       - No axes / no labels inside inset (pure composition)
#   • A single GLOBAL LEGEND at the bottom:
#       - Taxon legend shown as smooth (no pattern)
#       - Element legend shown as pattern (Carbon vs Nitrogen)
#
# WHY THIS CHUNK IS STABLE:
#   • It checks required objects exist.
#   • It checks required columns exist.
#   • It stops with a clear message if comp_tbl_all becomes empty.
#
# REQUIRED INPUT OBJECTS:
#   - energy_df: must include Species, Unique_code, Taxon, ElementGroup, Delta_umol_L
#   - o2_tbl:    must include Species, Unique_code, Delta_umol_L
#   - species_3: character vector of the 3 species names to plot
#   - out_dir:   output folder (string). Will be created if missing.
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)
library(grid)
library(patchwork)  # for wrap_plots + wrap_elements
library(cowplot)    # for get_legend

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 0) Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
stopifnot(exists("energy_df"))
stopifnot(exists("o2_tbl"))
stopifnot(exists("species_3"))

# output folder
if (!exists("out_dir")) {
  out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species"
}
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) SETTINGS: colors + inset placement + connector style
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
fill_cols <- c(
  "Bact" = "#F4A6A6",
  "Euk"  = "#A8D5BA",
  "Pro"  = "#9DBCE3",
  "Syn"  = "#F6C28B",
  "DOC"  = "#B9B9B9",
  "DON"  = "#8F8F8F",
  "ΔO2"  = "#00BFC4",
  "Total Energy" = "#2F2F2F"
)

# Inset placement (x = data coords, y = fraction of the panel y-range)
# - Move inset RIGHT: increase INSET_XMIN and INSET_XMAX
# - Make inset NARROWER: decrease (INSET_XMAX - INSET_XMIN)
# - Move inset DOWN: decrease INSET_YMIN_FRAC and INSET_YMAX_FRAC
INSET_XMIN      <- 1.62
INSET_XMAX      <- 2.55
INSET_YMIN_FRAC <- 0.03
INSET_YMAX_FRAC <- 0.36

# Connector style (less confusing)
CONN_COL <- "grey30"
CONN_LWD <- 0.45
CONN_ALP <- 0.60

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Validate required columns (fail early with clear error)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
need_energy <- c("Species","Unique_code","Taxon","ElementGroup","Delta_umol_L")
need_o2     <- c("Species","Unique_code","Delta_umol_L")

missing_energy <- setdiff(need_energy, names(energy_df))
missing_o2     <- setdiff(need_o2, names(o2_tbl))

if (length(missing_energy) > 0) {
  stop("energy_df missing columns: ", paste(missing_energy, collapse = ", "),
       "\nAvailable: ", paste(names(energy_df), collapse = ", "))
}
if (length(missing_o2) > 0) {
  stop("o2_tbl missing columns: ", paste(missing_o2, collapse = ", "),
       "\nAvailable: ", paste(names(o2_tbl), collapse = ", "))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Build component table (per Unique_code × Taxon × ElementGroup)
#    This is the "building block" for Total Energy and inset breakdown.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
comp_tbl_all <- energy_df %>%
  transmute(
    Species      = as.character(Species),
    Unique_code  = as.character(Unique_code),
    Taxon        = as.character(Taxon),
    ElementGroup = as.character(ElementGroup),      # Carbon / Nitrogen
    Value        = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta_umol_L))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    Species %in% species_3,
    !is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != "",
    !is.na(Taxon), Taxon != "",
    !is.na(ElementGroup), ElementGroup != "",
    !is.na(Value)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Taxon = factor(Taxon, levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON")),
    # Robust Nitrogen detection (case-insensitive)
    pattern_key = if_else(tolower(ElementGroup) == "nitrogen", "stripe", "none"),
    pattern_key = factor(pattern_key, levels = c("none","stripe"))
  )

# stop if empty (prevents silent "blank" plots)
if (nrow(comp_tbl_all) == 0) {
  stop(
    "comp_tbl_all is EMPTY after filtering.\n",
    "Check that:\n",
    "  - species_3 matches the Species strings in energy_df\n",
    "  - ElementGroup contains Carbon/Nitrogen\n",
    "  - Delta_umol_L is numeric and not all NA\n\n",
    "Species in energy_df: ", paste(sort(unique(energy_df$Species)), collapse = ", "), "\n",
    "ElementGroup in energy_df: ", paste(sort(unique(energy_df$ElementGroup)), collapse = ", ")
  )
}
message("comp_tbl_all OK: n = ", nrow(comp_tbl_all))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Total Energy per Unique_code (sum across components)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
total_tbl_all <- comp_tbl_all %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Metric = "Total Energy", ColorKey = "Total Energy")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) ΔO2 per Unique_code
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
o2_tbl_all <- o2_tbl %>%
  transmute(
    Species     = as.character(Species),
    Unique_code = as.character(Unique_code),
    Value       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta_umol_L)),
    Metric      = "ΔO2",
    ColorKey    = "ΔO2"
  ) %>%
  filter(Species %in% species_3, !is.na(Value), !is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != "")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Main DF for boxplots
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
main_df_all <- bind_rows(
  total_tbl_all %>% transmute(Species, Unique_code, Value, Metric, ColorKey),
  o2_tbl_all    %>% transmute(Species, Unique_code, Value, Metric, ColorKey)
) %>%
  mutate(Metric = factor(Metric, levels = c("Total Energy","ΔO2")))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) INSET stacked bar (species mean breakdown) — NO axes, NO legend
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_inset_stack <- function(sp) {

  df <- comp_tbl_all %>%
    filter(Species == sp) %>%
    group_by(Taxon, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
    summarise(Mean = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(x = "Total")

  ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = Mean, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.25, colour = "grey55") +
    geom_col_pattern(
      width = 1.0,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.20,
      pattern_colour = "black",
      pattern_fill   = NA,
      pattern_angle  = 45,
      pattern_density = 0.12,
      pattern_spacing = 0.02,
      pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_pattern_manual(values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe")) +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0.02)) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) Panel builder: main boxplots + inset + connectors (Q1/Q3 -> inset corners)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_panel_with_inset <- function(
  sp,
  inset_xmin      = INSET_XMIN,
  inset_xmax      = INSET_XMAX,
  inset_ymin_frac = INSET_YMIN_FRAC,
  inset_ymax_frac = INSET_YMAX_FRAC
) {

  df_main <- main_df_all %>% filter(Species == sp)

  # y-range for this species panel
  y_min <- min(df_main$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_max <- max(df_main$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_rng <- y_max - y_min
  if (!is.finite(y_rng) || y_rng == 0) y_rng <- 1

  inset_ymin <- y_min + inset_ymin_frac * y_rng
  inset_ymax <- y_min + inset_ymax_frac * y_rng

  # Total Energy quartiles (anchor points)
  te_vals <- df_main %>% filter(Metric == "Total Energy") %>% pull(Value)
  q1 <- as.numeric(quantile(te_vals, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3 <- as.numeric(quantile(te_vals, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))

  inset_grob <- ggplotGrob(make_inset_stack(sp))

  ggplot(df_main, aes(x = Metric, y = Value)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_boxplot(
      aes(fill = ColorKey),
      width = 0.70,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      aes(color = ColorKey),
      width = 0.10,
      height = 0,
      alpha = 0.8,
      size = 2.3
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    scale_color_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    labs(
      title = bquote(italic(.(sp))),
      x = NULL,
      y = expression(paste(Delta, " (", mu, "mol L"^{-1}, ")"))
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +

    # connectors (lighter, less confusing)
    geom_segment(x = 1.25, y = q3, xend = inset_xmin, yend = inset_ymax,
                 linewidth = CONN_LWD, colour = CONN_COL, alpha = CONN_ALP) +
    geom_segment(x = 1.25, y = q1, xend = inset_xmin, yend = inset_ymin,
                 linewidth = CONN_LWD, colour = CONN_COL, alpha = CONN_ALP) +

    # inset in data coordinates
    annotation_custom(
      grob = inset_grob,
      xmin = inset_xmin, xmax = inset_xmax,
      ymin = inset_ymin, ymax = inset_ymax
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9) Build the 3 panels + arrange in 1 row
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
panels <- lapply(species_3, make_panel_with_inset)
p_panels <- patchwork::wrap_plots(panels, nrow = 1)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10) GLOBAL LEGEND (once) — FIXED:
#     - Taxon legend = smooth squares (no pattern)
#     - Element legend = pattern (Carbon vs Nitrogen)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
legend_plot <- comp_tbl_all %>%
  group_by(Taxon, ElementGroup, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(Mean = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(x = "Legend") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = Mean, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)) +
  geom_col_pattern(
    width = 0.8,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.25,
    pattern_colour = "black",
    pattern_fill   = NA,
    pattern_angle  = 45,
    pattern_density = 0.12,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02,
    pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE, name = "Taxon") +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"),
    breaks = c("none","stripe"),
    labels = c("Carbon","Nitrogen"),
    name = "Element"
  ) +
  guides(
    # ✅ Taxon = smooth (override pattern to none)
    fill = guide_legend(
      order = 1,
      override.aes = list(pattern = "none", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.3)
    ),
    # ✅ Element = show only pattern on neutral fill
    pattern = guide_legend(
      order = 2,
      override.aes = list(
        fill = "grey80",
        colour = "black",
        pattern = c("none", "stripe"),
        pattern_colour = "black",
        pattern_density = 0.5,
        pattern_spacing = 0.02,
        pattern_angle = 45
      )
    )
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

leg <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# combine panels + legend
p_final <- p_panels / patchwork::wrap_elements(leg) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.13))

print(p_final)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11) Save
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "Energy_budget_BOX_Total_O2_with_STACK_INSET_and_GLOBAL_LEGEND.png",
  plot = p_final,
  path = out_dir,
  width = 40,
  height = 16,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 300
)

```


### ENERGY BUDGET FIGURE — 2 SEPARATE OUTPUTS (DONUT vs TREEMAP)
```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
################################################################################
# ENERGY BUDGET FIGURE — 2 SEPARATE OUTPUTS (DONUT vs TREEMAP)  ✅ FROM ROW
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# REQUIREMENTS:
#   - raw_individual_tbl_num must exist (ROW table)
#   - species_3 must exist (3 species names)
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)
library(grid)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(treemapify)
library(stringr)

stopifnot(exists("raw_individual_tbl_num"))
stopifnot(exists("species_3"))

# output folder
out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species"
out_dir <- normalizePath(out_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 0) BUILD energy_df + o2_tbl FROM ROW  ✅
#    - Collapse PEuk/NEuk/Euk -> Euk
#    - Scale ALL Nitrogen by 3 (includes *_N and DON)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
row_tbl <- raw_individual_tbl_num %>%
  transmute(
    Unique_code  = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    Species      = str_trim(as.character(species)),
    parameter    = str_trim(as.character(parameter)),
    Delta_umol_L = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != "",
         !is.na(Species), Species != "")

# Energy components only (FCM taxa C/N + DOC/DON)
energy_df <- row_tbl %>%
  filter(
    parameter %in% c("DOC","DON") |
      str_detect(parameter, "^(Bact|Pro|Syn|Euk|PEuk|NEuk)_(C|N)$")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Taxon = case_when(
      parameter %in% c("DOC","DON") ~ parameter,
      TRUE ~ str_replace(parameter, "_(C|N)$", "")
    ),
    ElementGroup = case_when(
      parameter == "DOC" ~ "Carbon",
      parameter == "DON" ~ "Nitrogen",
      str_detect(parameter, "_C$") ~ "Carbon",
      str_detect(parameter, "_N$") ~ "Nitrogen",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Taxon = case_when(
      Taxon %in% c("PEuk","NEuk","Euk") ~ "Euk",
      TRUE ~ Taxon
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ElementGroup), !is.na(Taxon), Taxon != "") %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code, Taxon, ElementGroup) %>%
  summarise(Delta_umol_L = sum(Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    # scale Nitrogen
    Delta_umol_L = if_else(ElementGroup == "Nitrogen", Delta_umol_L * 3, Delta_umol_L)
  )

# ΔO2 from ROW (separate bar)
o2_tbl <- row_tbl %>%
  filter(parameter == "O2") %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code) %>%
  summarise(Delta_umol_L = mean(Delta_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) SETTINGS (colors + connectors + pattern)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
fill_cols <- c(
  "Bact" = "#F4A6A6",
  "Euk"  = "#A8D5BA",
  "Pro"  = "#9DBCE3",
  "Syn"  = "#F6C28B",
  "DOC"  = "#B9B9B9",
  "DON"  = "#8F8F8F",
  "ΔO2"  = "#00BFC4",
  "Total Energy" = "#2F2F2F"
)

# connectors
CONN_COL <- "grey30"
CONN_LWD <- 0.45
CONN_ALP <- 0.60

# pattern settings (Nitrogen stripes)
PAT_DENS  <- 0.18
PAT_SPACE <- 0.02

# Inset placement (DONUT bigger than TREEMAP)
INSET_XMIN_DONUT      <- 1.38
INSET_XMAX_DONUT      <- 2.62
INSET_YMIN_FRAC_DONUT <- 0.02
INSET_YMAX_FRAC_DONUT <- 0.46

INSET_XMIN_TREEMAP      <- 1.48
INSET_XMAX_TREEMAP      <- 2.55
INSET_YMIN_FRAC_TREEMAP <- 0.03
INSET_YMAX_FRAC_TREEMAP <- 0.36

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Component table (per Unique_code × Taxon × ElementGroup)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
comp_tbl_all <- energy_df %>%
  transmute(
    Species      = as.character(Species),
    Unique_code  = as.character(Unique_code),
    Taxon        = as.character(Taxon),
    ElementGroup = as.character(ElementGroup),
    Value        = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta_umol_L))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    Species %in% species_3,
    !is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != "",
    !is.na(Taxon), Taxon != "",
    !is.na(ElementGroup), ElementGroup != "",
    is.finite(Value)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Taxon = factor(Taxon, levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON")),
    ElementGroup_clean = str_to_lower(str_squish(ElementGroup)),
    pattern_key = if_else(str_detect(ElementGroup_clean, "nitrogen|^n$"),
                          "stripe", "none"),
    pattern_key = factor(pattern_key, levels = c("none","stripe"))
  )

if (nrow(comp_tbl_all) == 0) {
  stop(
    "comp_tbl_all is EMPTY after filtering.\n",
    "Check that energy_df has rows for species_3 and parameters were found in ROW.\n",
    "Species in ROW: ", paste(sort(unique(row_tbl$Species)), collapse = ", "), "\n",
    "Parameters in ROW: ", paste(sort(unique(row_tbl$parameter)), collapse = ", ")
  )
}

message("pattern_key counts: ",
        paste(names(table(comp_tbl_all$pattern_key)),
              as.integer(table(comp_tbl_all$pattern_key)),
              collapse = " | "))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Total Energy per Unique_code (sum across components)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
total_tbl_all <- comp_tbl_all %>%
  group_by(Species, Unique_code) %>%
  summarise(Value = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Metric = "Total Energy", ColorKey = "Total Energy")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) ΔO2 per Unique_code (from o2_tbl built above)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
o2_tbl_all <- o2_tbl %>%
  transmute(
    Species     = as.character(Species),
    Unique_code = as.character(Unique_code),
    Value       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Delta_umol_L)),
    Metric      = "ΔO2",
    ColorKey    = "ΔO2"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    Species %in% species_3,
    !is.na(Value),
    !is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != ""
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) Main DF for boxplots
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
main_df_all <- bind_rows(
  total_tbl_all %>% transmute(Species, Unique_code, Value, Metric, ColorKey),
  o2_tbl_all    %>% transmute(Species, Unique_code, Value, Metric, ColorKey)
) %>%
  mutate(Metric = factor(Metric, levels = c("Total Energy","ΔO2")))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) INSET OPTION A — DONUT
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_inset_donut <- function(sp) {

  df <- comp_tbl_all %>%
    filter(Species == sp) %>%
    group_by(Taxon, pattern_key) %>%
    summarise(AbsMean = sum(abs(Value), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(is.finite(AbsMean), AbsMean > 0)

  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(ggplot() + theme_void())

  ggplot(df, aes(x = 1.2, y = AbsMean, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)) +
    ggpattern::geom_col_pattern(
      width = 1.9,
      colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.25,
      pattern_fill   = NA,
      pattern_colour = "black",
      pattern_angle  = 45,
      pattern_density = PAT_DENS,
      pattern_spacing = PAT_SPACE
    ) +
    coord_polar(theta = "y") +
    xlim(0.0, 2.9) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_pattern_manual(values = c("none"="none","stripe"="stripe")) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) INSET OPTION B — TREEMAP (striped nitrogen + dashed outline)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_inset_treemap <- function(sp) {

  df_sp <- comp_tbl_all %>%
    filter(Species == sp) %>%
    group_by(Taxon, pattern_key) %>%
    summarise(AbsMean = sum(abs(Value), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(is.finite(AbsMean), AbsMean > 0) %>%
    mutate(
      Taxon       = factor(Taxon, levels = c("Bact","Euk","Pro","Syn","DOC","DON")),
      pattern_key = factor(pattern_key, levels = c("none","stripe")),
      row_id      = row_number()
    )

  if (nrow(df_sp) == 0) return(ggplot() + theme_void())

  p_layout <- ggplot(df_sp, aes(area = AbsMean, fill = Taxon, label = row_id)) +
    treemapify::geom_treemap() +
    theme_void()

  rects <- ggplot_build(p_layout)$data[[1]]
  need_cols <- c("xmin","xmax","ymin","ymax","label")

  if (!all(need_cols %in% names(rects))) {
    return(
      ggplot(df_sp, aes(area = AbsMean, fill = Taxon)) +
        treemapify::geom_treemap(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(legend.position = "none", plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0))
    )
  }

  rects2 <- rects %>%
    transmute(
      xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax,
      row_id = suppressWarnings(as.integer(label))
    ) %>%
    left_join(df_sp %>% select(row_id, Taxon, pattern_key), by = "row_id")

  rects_carbon <- rects2 %>% filter(pattern_key == "none")
  rects_nitro  <- rects2 %>% filter(pattern_key == "stripe")

  if (nrow(rects_nitro) == 0) {
    return(
      ggplot(df_sp, aes(area = AbsMean, fill = Taxon)) +
        treemapify::geom_treemap(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(legend.position = "none", plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0))
    )
  }

  ggplot() +
    geom_rect(
      data = rects_carbon,
      aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = Taxon),
      colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ) +
    ggpattern::geom_rect_pattern(
      data = rects_nitro,
      aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = Taxon),
      colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.25,
      pattern = "stripe",
      pattern_fill   = NA,
      pattern_colour = "black",
      pattern_angle  = 45,
      pattern_density = 0.55,
      pattern_spacing = 0.010
    ) +
    geom_rect(
      data = rects_nitro,
      aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
      fill = NA,
      colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.65,
      linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE) +
    coord_equal(expand = FALSE) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) Panel builder (boxplots + inset + connectors)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
make_panel_with_inset <- function(sp, inset_type = c("donut","treemap")) {

  inset_type <- match.arg(inset_type)
  df_main <- main_df_all %>% filter(Species == sp)

  y_min <- min(df_main$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_max <- max(df_main$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_rng <- y_max - y_min
  if (!is.finite(y_rng) || y_rng == 0) y_rng <- 1

  if (inset_type == "donut") {
    ixmin <- INSET_XMIN_DONUT; ixmax <- INSET_XMAX_DONUT
    iymin_frac <- INSET_YMIN_FRAC_DONUT; iymax_frac <- INSET_YMAX_FRAC_DONUT
  } else {
    ixmin <- INSET_XMIN_TREEMAP; ixmax <- INSET_XMAX_TREEMAP
    iymin_frac <- INSET_YMIN_FRAC_TREEMAP; iymax_frac <- INSET_YMAX_FRAC_TREEMAP
  }

  inset_ymin <- y_min + iymin_frac * y_rng
  inset_ymax <- y_min + iymax_frac * y_rng

  te_vals <- df_main %>% filter(Metric == "Total Energy") %>% pull(Value)
  q1 <- as.numeric(quantile(te_vals, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))
  q3 <- as.numeric(quantile(te_vals, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))

  inset_grob <- if (inset_type == "donut") ggplotGrob(make_inset_donut(sp)) else ggplotGrob(make_inset_treemap(sp))

  ggplot(df_main, aes(x = Metric, y = Value)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = ColorKey), width = 0.70, outlier.shape = NA,
                 colour = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = ColorKey), width = 0.10, height = 0,
                alpha = 0.8, size = 2.3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    scale_color_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    labs(title = bquote(italic(.(sp))), x = NULL,
         y = expression(paste(Delta, " (", mu, "mol L"^{-1}, ")"))) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10)) +
    geom_segment(x = 1.25, y = q3, xend = ixmin, yend = inset_ymax,
                 linewidth = CONN_LWD, colour = CONN_COL, alpha = CONN_ALP) +
    geom_segment(x = 1.25, y = q1, xend = ixmin, yend = inset_ymin,
                 linewidth = CONN_LWD, colour = CONN_COL, alpha = CONN_ALP) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    annotation_custom(grob = inset_grob, xmin = ixmin, xmax = ixmax, ymin = inset_ymin, ymax = inset_ymax)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9) Global legend (Taxon colors + Carbon/Nitrogen pattern)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
legend_plot <- comp_tbl_all %>%
  group_by(Taxon, ElementGroup_clean, pattern_key) %>%
  summarise(Mean = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(x = "Legend") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = Mean, fill = Taxon, pattern = pattern_key)) +
  ggpattern::geom_col_pattern(
    width = 0.8,
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.25,
    pattern_colour = "black",
    pattern_fill   = NA,
    pattern_angle  = 45,
    pattern_density = 0.12,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02,
    pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols, drop = FALSE, name = "Taxon") +
  scale_pattern_manual(
    values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"),
    breaks = c("none","stripe"),
    labels = c("Carbon","Nitrogen"),
    name = "Element"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1,
                        override.aes = list(pattern = "none", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.3)),
    pattern = guide_legend(order = 2,
                           override.aes = list(fill = "grey80", colour = "black",
                                              pattern = c("none","stripe"),
                                              pattern_colour = "black",
                                              pattern_density = 0.5,
                                              pattern_spacing = 0.02,
                                              pattern_angle = 45))
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

leg <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10) Build BOTH figures
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
panels_donut   <- lapply(species_3, make_panel_with_inset, inset_type = "donut")
panels_treemap <- lapply(species_3, make_panel_with_inset, inset_type = "treemap")

p_final_donut <- wrap_plots(panels_donut, nrow = 1) / wrap_elements(leg) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.13)) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Inset option A: DONUT (FROM ROW)")

p_final_treemap <- wrap_plots(panels_treemap, nrow = 1) / wrap_elements(leg) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.13)) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Inset option B: TREEMAP (FROM ROW)")

print(p_final_donut)
print(p_final_treemap)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11) Save BOTH PNGs
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Energy_budget_BOX_Total_O2_with_DONUT_INSET_FROMROW.png"),
  plot = p_final_donut,
  width = 40, height = 16, units = "cm", dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Energy_budget_BOX_Total_O2_with_TREEMAP_INSET_FROMROW.png"),
  plot = p_final_treemap,
  width = 40, height = 16, units = "cm", dpi = 300
)


```


```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
################################################################################
# DOC:DON ratio from DELTAS (Δ = IN - EX)
# DON is computed as: ΔDON = ΔTN - ΔDIN, where ΔDIN = ΔNOx + ΔNH4
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

stopifnot(exists("sponge_db2_with_cn"))

# -----------------------------
# Helper: mean + 95% CI (t interval)
# -----------------------------
mean_ci95_range <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)

  if (n == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      mean = NA_real_, ci95 = NA_real_, n = 0L,
      min = NA_real_, max = NA_real_,
      q05 = NA_real_, q95 = NA_real_,
      sd = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  if (n == 1) {
    return(tibble(
      mean = x[1], ci95 = NA_real_, n = 1L,
      min = x[1], max = x[1],
      q05 = x[1], q95 = x[1],
      sd = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  m  <- mean(x)
  s  <- sd(x)
  se <- s / sqrt(n)
  ci <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se

  tibble(
    mean = m,
    ci95 = ci,
    n    = as.integer(n),
    min  = min(x),
    max  = max(x),
    q05  = unname(quantile(x, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
    q95  = unname(quantile(x, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)),
    sd   = s
  )
}
# -----------------------------
# 1) Per-unique_code deltas and ΔDOC:ΔDON ratio
# -----------------------------
doc_don_delta_uc <- sponge_db2_with_cn %>%
  transmute(
    Unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    Species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),

    DOC_in = as.numeric(dom_ex_in_doc_conc_umol_l),
    DOC_ex = as.numeric(dom_ex_ex_doc_conc_umol_l),

    TN_in  = as.numeric(dom_ex_in_tn_conc_umol_l),
    TN_ex  = as.numeric(dom_ex_ex_tn_conc_umol_l),

    NOx_in = as.numeric(ex_in_nox_conc_umol_l),
    NOx_ex = as.numeric(ex_ex_nox_conc_umol_l),

    NH4_in = as.numeric(ex_in_nh_conc_umol_l),
    NH4_ex = as.numeric(ex_ex_nh_conc_umol_l)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != "",
    !is.na(Species), Species != ""
  ) %>%
  group_by(Unique_code, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    DOC_in = mean(DOC_in, na.rm = TRUE),
    DOC_ex = mean(DOC_ex, na.rm = TRUE),

    TN_in  = mean(TN_in,  na.rm = TRUE),
    TN_ex  = mean(TN_ex,  na.rm = TRUE),

    NOx_in = mean(NOx_in, na.rm = TRUE),
    NOx_ex = mean(NOx_ex, na.rm = TRUE),

    NH4_in = mean(NH4_in, na.rm = TRUE),
    NH4_ex = mean(NH4_ex, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Deltas (Δ = IN - EX)
    dDOC = DOC_in - DOC_ex,
    dTN  = TN_in  - TN_ex,
    dNOx = NOx_in - NOx_ex,
    dNH4 = NH4_in - NH4_ex,

    # ΔDIN robust NA handling:
    # - if both NOx and NH4 are NA -> ΔDIN NA
    # - if one exists -> treat missing as 0
    dDIN = if_else(is.na(dNOx) & is.na(dNH4), NA_real_, coalesce(dNOx, 0) + coalesce(dNH4, 0)),

    # ΔDON = ΔTN - ΔDIN, only if both exist
    dDON = if_else(!is.na(dTN) & !is.na(dDIN), dTN - dDIN, NA_real_),

    # Ratio from deltas
    DOC_DON_delta = dDOC / dDON,
    DOC_DON_delta = if_else(is.finite(DOC_DON_delta) & dDON != 0, DOC_DON_delta, NA_real_)
  )

# QC
doc_don_delta_uc %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_ratio = sum(is.finite(DOC_DON_delta)),
    n_missing = sum(!is.finite(DOC_DON_delta)),
    n_dDON_zero = sum(is.finite(dDON) & dDON == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% print()

# -----------------------------
# 2) Species summary (mean + CI95) of the ratio
# -----------------------------
doc_don_delta_species <- doc_don_delta_uc %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci95(DOC_DON_delta), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean))

print(doc_don_delta_species)

# -----------------------------
# 3) Plot (individuals + species mean + CI)
# -----------------------------
sp_levels <- doc_don_delta_species %>% arrange(mean) %>% pull(Species)

p_ratio_delta <- ggplot(
  doc_don_delta_uc %>% mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = sp_levels)),
  aes(x = Species, y = DOC_DON_delta)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0), size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data = doc_don_delta_species %>% mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = sp_levels)),
    aes(x = Species, y = mean),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.3
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = doc_don_delta_species %>% mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = sp_levels)),
    aes(x = Species, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.18,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "ΔDOC:ΔDON ratio by individual and species",
    subtitle = "Δ = IN − EX. ΔDON computed as (ΔTN − (ΔNOx + ΔNH4)).",
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(paste(Delta,"DOC / ",Delta,"DON"))
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1))

print(p_ratio_delta)

# -----------------------------
# 4) Save outputs (optional)
# -----------------------------
out_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/by_species"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write.csv(doc_don_delta_uc,
          file.path(out_dir, "DeltaDOC_DeltaDON_ratio_per_unique_code.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(doc_don_delta_species,
          file.path(out_dir, "DeltaDOC_DeltaDON_ratio_species_mean_CI95.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "DeltaDOC_DeltaDON_ratio_by_species.png"),
       p_ratio_delta, width = 22, height = 14, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "DeltaDOC_DeltaDON_ratio_by_species.pdf"),
       p_ratio_delta, width = 22, height = 14, units = "cm")
################################################################################
# END
################################################################################



################################################################################
# BETTER DOM STOICHIOMETRY DIAGNOSTICS (Δ = IN - EX)
# - Separate processes:
#   (A) Assimilated DOM stoichiometry: only where ΔDOC > 0 AND ΔDON > 0
#   (B) DON release behavior: use ΔDON itself (sign + magnitude), not ratios
# - Visual outputs:
#   1) ΔDOC by species (points + mean ± CI95)
#   2) ΔDON by species (points + mean ± CI95)
#   3) Scatter: ΔDOC vs ΔDON with quadrant lines
#   4) (Optional) Ratio ΔDOC/ΔDON only on uptake subset
################################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

stopifnot(exists("sponge_db2_with_cn"))

# -----------------------------
# Helper: mean + 95% CI (t interval)
# -----------------------------
mean_ci95 <- function(x){
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)
  if (n < 2) return(tibble(mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), lo = NA_real_, hi = NA_real_, n = n))
  m  <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  se <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n)
  t  <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1)
  tibble(mean = m, lo = m - t*se, hi = m + t*se, n = n)
}

# -----------------------------
# 1) Per-unique_code means (IN/EX) + deltas
# -----------------------------
dom_delta_uc <- sponge_db2_with_cn %>%
  transmute(
    Unique_code = str_trim(as.character(unique_code)),
    Species     = str_trim(as.character(species)),

    DOC_in = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dom_ex_in_doc_conc_umol_l)),
    DOC_ex = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dom_ex_ex_doc_conc_umol_l)),

    TN_in  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dom_ex_in_tn_conc_umol_l)),
    TN_ex  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dom_ex_ex_tn_conc_umol_l)),

    NOx_in = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ex_in_nox_conc_umol_l)),
    NOx_ex = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ex_ex_nox_conc_umol_l)),

    NH4_in = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ex_in_nh_conc_umol_l)),
    NH4_ex = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ex_ex_nh_conc_umol_l))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Unique_code), Unique_code != "",
    !is.na(Species), Species != ""
  ) %>%
  group_by(Unique_code, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    DOC_in = mean(DOC_in, na.rm = TRUE),
    DOC_ex = mean(DOC_ex, na.rm = TRUE),
```
